We’re seeking highly perceptive and detail-oriented trainers passionate about shaping the future of AI. Bring your refined judgment, critical thinking skills, and commitment to excellence to our customer's team and make a meaningful impact on emerging AI technologies.

title: Staff Software Engineer I
description:
**Lead Full Stack Developer**
-----------------------------

We are looking for a Lead Full Stack Developer with extensive and solid hands-on experience in designing, developing, and maintaining scalable web applications. The ideal candidate has deep knowledge of Java or Scala, automated testing frameworks, REST APIs, microservices, and modern frontend frameworks such as Angular or React. You will work in cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality, secure, and scalable enterprise solutions.


Pagero has recently become part of Thomson Reuters. Together, we are building the world’s largest open business network. Through our cloud-based network, customers can reach any business, anywhere in the world—regardless of how many borders their operations span. We handle the technical and regulatory requirements across the entire order-to-cash, purchase-to-pay, and logistics processes, providing customers with data accuracy, security, transparency, and real-time visibility—all through a single connection.


**About the Role**

As a Lead Full Stack Developer, you will:


* Design, develop, and maintain end-to-end web applications using Java and modern frontend frameworks.
* Develop RESTful APIs and microservices.
* Collaborate with UI/UX designers and backend developers.
* Implement automated testing as an integrated part of delivery.
* Participate in Agile/Scrum ceremonies and contribute to sprint planning, reviews, and retrospectives.
* Integrate with relational and NoSQL databases such as PostgreSQL and S3.
* Lead code reviews, mentor junior developers, and ensure adherence to coding standards.
* Optimize applications for maximum speed, scalability, and performance.
* Implement CI/CD pipelines and deploy applications to cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud Platform).
* Ensure application security and data protection.

**About You**

You are a good fit for the Lead Full Stack Developer role if you meet the following requirements:


* At least 10 years of professional experience in Java/J2EE or Scala development.
* Strong knowledge of Angular or ReactJS for frontend development.
* Solid understanding of RESTful API design and microservices architecture.
* Experience with SQL and NoSQL databases.
* Good knowledge of Docker, Kubernetes, or other containerization tools.
* Hands-on experience with CI/CD tools such as Jenkins, GitHub Actions, or GitLab CI.
* Excellent communication and problem-solving skills.
* Experience with message queues such as RabbitMQ.
* Full professional English and Swedish language skills

All final candidates undergo an extended background check as a mandatory part of the recruitment process. Swedish or European citizenship is required.


**Employment Type**

This is a hybrid position. We apply a policy requiring at least three working days per week in the office.


**Lead Full Stack Developer**

Vi söker en Lead Full Stack Developer med lång och gedigen praktisk erfarenhet av att designa, utveckla och förvalta skalbara webbapplikationer. Den idealiska kandidaten har djupa kunskaper inom Java eller Scala, automatiserade testramverk, REST API:er, mikrotjänster samt moderna frontendramverk som Angular eller React. Du kommer att arbeta i tvärfunktionella team för att leverera högkvalitativa, säkra och skalbara företagslösningar.


Pagero har nyligen blivit en del av Thomson Reuters. Tillsammans bygger vi världens största öppna affärsnätverk. Med vårt molnbaserade nätverk kan kunder nå vilket företag som helst, var som helst i världen – oavsett hur många gränser deras verksamhet sträcker sig över. Vi hanterar de tekniska och regulatoriska kraven inom hela order-to-cash-, purchase-to-pay- och fraktprocesserna, för att ge kunderna datanoggrannhet, säkerhet, transparens och realtidsöverblick. Allt detta via en enda anslutning.


**Om rollen**

Som Lead Full Stack Developer kommer du att:


* Designa, utveckla och förvalta heltäckande webbapplikationer med Java och moderna frontendramverk.
* Utveckla RESTful API:er och mikrotjänster.
* Samarbeta med UI/UX-designers och backendutvecklare.
* Implementera automatiserade tester som en integrerad del av leveransen.
* Delta i Agile/Scrum-ceremonier och bidra till sprintplanering, granskningar och retrospektiv.
* Integrera med relationsdatabaser och NoSQL-databaser såsom PostgreSQL och S3.
* Leda kodgranskningar, coacha juniora utvecklare och säkerställa att kodstandarder följs.
* Optimera applikationer för maximal hastighet, skalbarhet och prestanda.
* Implementera CI/CD-pipelines och driftsätta applikationer på molnplattformar (AWS/Azure/Google Cloud Platform).
* Säkerställa applikationssäkerhet och dataskydd.

**Om dig**

Du passar för rollen som Lead Full Stack Developer om du uppfyller följande krav:


* Minst 10 års professionell erfarenhet av Java/J2EE- eller Scala-utveckling.
* Goda kunskaper i Angular eller ReactJS för frontendutveckling.
* Solid förståelse för RESTful API-design och mikrotjänstarkitektur.
* Erfarenhet av SQL- och NoSQL-databaser.
* Goda kunskaper om Docker, Kubernetes eller andra containeriseringsverktyg.
* Praktisk kunskap om CI/CD-verktyg såsom Jenkins, GitHub Actions eller GitLab CI.
* Utmärkt kommunikationsförmåga och problemlösningsförmåga.
* Erfarenhet av meddelandeköer såsom RabbitMQ.
* Samtliga slutkandidater genomgår en utökad bakgrundskontroll som en obligatorisk del av rekryteringsprocessen.
* Svenskt eller europeiskt medborgarskap krävs.
* Anställningsform
* Tjänsten är en hybridanställning. Vi tillämpar en policy om minst tre arbetsdagar per vecka på kontoret.
* Fulla professionella kunskaper i engelska och svenska

#LI-EH2


**What’s in it For You?**

* **Hybrid Work Model:** We’ve adopted a flexible hybrid working environment (2-3 days a week in the office depending on the role) for our office-based roles while delivering a seamless experience that is digitally and physically connected.
* **Flexibility & Work-Life Balance:** Flex My Way is a set of supportive workplace policies designed to help manage personal and professional responsibilities, whether caring for family, giving back to the community, or finding time to refresh and reset. This builds upon our flexible work arrangements, including work from anywhere for up to 8 weeks per year, empowering employees to achieve a better work-life balance.
* **Career Development and Growth:** By fostering a culture of continuous learning and skill development, we prepare our talent to tackle tomorrow’s challenges and deliver real-world solutions. Our Grow My Way programming and skills-first approach ensures you have the tools and knowledge to grow, lead, and thrive in an AI-enabled future.
* **Industry Competitive Benefits:** We offer comprehensive benefit plans to include flexible vacation, two company-wide Mental Health Days off, access to the Headspace app, retirement savings, tuition reimbursement, employee incentive programs, and resources for mental, physical, and financial wellbeing.
* **Culture:** Globally recognized, award-winning reputation for inclusion and belonging, flexibility, work-life balance, and more. We live by our values: Obsess over our Customers, Compete to Win, Challenge (Y)our Thinking, Act Fast / Learn Fast, and Stronger Together.
* **Social Impact:** Make an impact in your community with our Social Impact Institute. We offer employees two paid volunteer days off annually and opportunities to get involved with pro-bono consulting projects and Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) initiatives.
* **Making a Real-World Impact:** We are one of the few companies globally that helps its customers pursue justice, truth, and transparency. Together, with the professionals and institutions we serve, we help uphold the rule of law, turn the wheels of commerce, catch bad actors, report the facts, and provide trusted, unbiased information to people all over the world.
**About Us**

Thomson Reuters informs the way forward by bringing together the trusted content and technology that people and organizations need to make the right decisions. We serve professionals across legal, tax, accounting, compliance, government, and media. Our products combine highly specialized software and insights to empower professionals with the data, intelligence, and solutions needed to make informed decisions, and to help institutions in their pursuit of justice, truth, and transparency. Reuters, part of Thomson Reuters, is a world leading provider of trusted journalism and news.


We are powered by the talents of 26,000 employees across more than 70 countries, where everyone has a chance to contribute and grow professionally in flexible work environments. At a time when objectivity, accuracy, fairness, and transparency are under attack, we consider it our duty to pursue them. Sound exciting? Join us and help shape the industries that move society forward.


As a global business, we rely on the unique backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences of all employees to deliver on our business goals. To ensure we can do that, we seek talented, qualified employees in all our operations around the world regardless of race, color, sex/gender, including pregnancy, gender identity and expression, national origin, religion, sexual orientation, disability, age, marital status, citizen status, veteran status, or any other protected classification under applicable law. Thomson Reuters is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity Employer providing a drug-free workplace.


We also make reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities and for sincerely held religious beliefs in accordance with applicable law. More information on requesting an accommodation here .


Learn more on how to protect yourself from fraudulent job postings here .


More information about Thomson Reuters can be found on thomsonreuters.com.
company_description: We inform the way forward by delivering trusted content and technology that professionals and institutions need to make the right decisions.

title: Product Designer - H&M Womenswear Light Woven
description:
**Job Description**

 Exciting new opportunity to join H&M as a Fashion Designer within our Womenswear Light Woven department. As a Product Designer, you'll lead the way in identifying key products and crafting the perfect assortment for our target customers. We seek a passionate Designer skilled in building strong collections.
   

  





 Able to communicate your vision and product ideas in a clear way with a creative, fashion forward and commercial focus. Essentially you will have the ability to work close to season with a high pace proactive approach and able to build & maintain strong relationships both internally and with external partners.
   

  





 If you're a Designer who loves to collaborate, work in a team, and provide diverse markets with the best products sold worldwide than H&M could be the brand for you. This role will be handling a collection with a focus on light wovens across dresses, blouses, skirts and light trousers. It is key to have a high fashion sense of style and trends for our target customer, while maintaining a cost-conscious awareness throughout the design process.
   

  





 The role requires strong drive, high energy, creativity, and experience in coaching & leading others to commercial success!
   

  





**Qualifications**




 A minimum of a BA/MA or equivalent experience in Fashion/Textile Design
   

  




* Minimum of 3 years’ work experience as a Designer for Light Woven product types
* Background from an aspirational global brand or retailer
* International experience is meriting
* Attention to detail with strong knowledge on light woven products
* A creative mindset with sharp eye for both current and future trends
* Strong customer focus and commercial mindset for H&M´s global womenswear customer
* Experience working closely with suppliers/factories in Asia and Europe
* Strong skills in and used to working in Adobe Creative Suite programs
* 3D CLO is meriting
* Demonstrated communication skills and true collaborative team player
* Leadership and coaching mindset
* Independent, driven & proactive with “one step ahead” mindset
* Organized & structured, able to set priorities and follow timelines
* Flexible mindset and adaptable to changes in a fast moving & growing industry
* Fluent in English (Swedish not necessary)



**Additional information**




 This position is based in Stockholm, to start asap. You will report into the department Assortment Manager and work with a like-minded team of passionate Designers/Product Developers and Planners.
   

  





 If your experience, skills, and ambitions are right for this role,
 **please send your application including CV and relevant portfolio work** 
 (pdf max 10mb/uploading) Portfolio should include vision/mood boards, full design process and final collections and products from a variety of fashion design projects. All documents should be in English. Please ensure to include some work clearly relatable to the aspirational H&M Women’s target customer.
   

  





**Benefits**
  

 We offer all our employees at H&M Group attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. All our employees receive a staff discount card, usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. Brands covered by the discount are H&M (Beauty and Move included), COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET, Afound. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP. You can read more about our H&M Incentive Program here.
   

  





*In addition to our global benefits, all our local markets offer different competitive perks and benefits. Please note that they may differ between employment type and countries.*




**Inclusion & Diversity**
  

*H&M is a part of H&M Group. At H&M Group, we’re determined to create and maintain inclusive, diverse, and equitable workplaces throughout our organisation. Our teams should consist of a variety of people that share and combine their knowledge, experience, and ideas. Having a diverse workforce leads to a positive impact on how we address challenges, on what we perceive possible and on how we choose to relate to our colleagues and customers all over the world. Hence all diversity dimensions are taken into consideration in our recruitment process.*




*We strive to have a fair and equal process and therefore kindly ask you not to attach a cover letter in your application as they often contain information that easily can trigger unintentional biases.*




**Company Description**
  

 H&M is a fashion brand that offers the latest styles and inspiration, from fashion pieces and unique designer collaborations to affordable wardrobe essentials. Our business idea is fashion & quality at the best price in a sustainable way. Learn more about H & M here.

title: Design Manager, Subscriptions
description:
We’re looking for a Design Manager to lead and grow a team shaping the future of Spotify’s Subscriptions Mission. This team sits at the center of one of Spotify’s most critical company bets: driving sustainable free and paid user growth while delivering meaningful value to listeners around the world.
   

  

 Subscriptions is the primary driver of Spotify’s success. Our teams focus on acquisition, conversion, retention, pricing & packaging, and evolving the value of Premium across music, podcasts, and audiobooks. As Design Manager, you’ll play a key role in defining how users experience that value, from their first touchpoint with Spotify to long-term loyalty.
   

  

 You will lead a team of product and content designers embedded across cross-functional squads, partnering closely with Product, Engineering, User Research, Data Science, Marketing, and Regional teams to craft cohesive, global subscription experiences. You’ll balance experimentation with craft, short-term impact with long-term system health, and business growth with user trust.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Lead and grow a high-impact team of designers working across subscription initiatives
* Manage, coach, and support designers through mentorship, feedback, and career development
* Build a strong design culture grounded in collaboration, inclusion, and craft excellence
* Define and evolve the design vision across acquisition, conversion, pricing, packaging, and retention
* Ensure experimentation (A/B tests, feature rollouts, pricing changes) aligns with a cohesive long-term experience strategy
* Advocate for user-centered, data-informed decision-making across the mission
* Partner with cross-functional leaders to improve conversion, onboarding, Premium education, churn reduction, and winback strategies
* Collaborate with Marketing and Brand to ensure consistency across product surfaces and growth channels
* Design for global audiences by balancing consistency with local relevance in partnership with regional teams
* Champion accessibility and inclusive design across all subscription touchpoints
* Strengthen design systems and improve experimentation workflows, QA, and cross-team alignment
* Support teams in adopting Generative AI for concepting, prototyping, and experimentation
* Partner with Product and Engineering to identify where AI can unlock speed, creativity, and user value
* Provide design leadership and hands-on guidance on complex interaction, systems, and service design challenges when needed


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have 5+ years of experience leading design teams in consumer digital products
* You have experience working on growth, monetization, or subscription-based products
* You are experienced in product design and experience strategy, especially in experimentation-heavy environments
* You collaborate effectively with Product, Engineering, and Data to deliver measurable outcomes
* You balance high-quality craft with speed and iteration
* You care deeply about user-centered design, behavioral design, and lifecycle thinking
* You are comfortable navigating ambiguity in fast-moving environments
* You communicate clearly and influence stakeholders across multiple levels
* You have experience building and developing strong, inclusive design teams
* You have designed for global audiences and understand localization considerations
* You are familiar with Generative AI tools and workflows in design
* You integrate AI into your workflow to improve speed and quality
* You are thoughtful about ethics, accessibility, and quality in AI-driven experiences
* You are excited to help teams responsibly leverage AI in both internal workflows and user-facing experiences


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in London or Stockholm
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 Spotify transformed music listening forever when we launched in 2008. Our mission is to unlock the potential of human creativity by giving a million creative artists the opportunity to live off their art and billions of fans the chance to enjoy and be passionate about these creators. Everything we do is driven by our love for music and podcasting. Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: AI & Automation Intern
description:
**About Us**
 Velory is transforming how companies buy, manage, and reuse IT. Our platform automates the entire IT lifecycle from procurement to end-of-life helping companies operate smarter and save both time and money.
   

  

 A core part of Velory is our network of IT retailers. They are not just partners they are essential to how we deliver value.
   

  

 Through Velory, customers purchase hardware via IT retailers, making them a critical part of our product and delivery. At the same time, retailers are a powerful growth engine. By reselling Velory as part of their offering, they bring new customers, new revenue, and help us scale across markets.
   

  

 We’ve already proven that this model works. Now, we’re scaling it across Europe.
   

  

 We’re looking for someone who wants to take ownership of that journey building strong relationships, driving initiatives forward, and creating long-term value together with our customers and partners.
   

  

****What You Will Do****
 Are you curious about AI, automation and how technology can improve the way companies work every day? Do you enjoy solving problems, testing new ideas, and working hands-on in a fast-moving environment? Then this could be the perfect opportunity for you.
   

  

 We’re looking for an
 **AI & Automation Intern** 
 to join our team in Stockholm. This is a unique opportunity to combine practical operations work with AI-driven innovation, helping us improve both internal processes and customer experience.
   

  

**AI & Automation**
* Identify repetitive tasks and opportunities for automation across support and operations
* Build and maintain simple AI-powered tools, workflows, and internal solutions
* Explore and test new AI technologies to improve efficiency and user experience
* Help create reporting and insights from a support and operations perspective


**Support & Customer Experience**
* Assist with customer support tasks such as tickets, onboarding and admin requests
* Understand customer needs and recurring pain points through daily interactions
* Use support learnings to improve processes and automation initiatives


**Content & Operations**
* Create and update help center articles, guides and internal documentation
* Support operational workflows and internal coordination tasks
* Improve how information is structured and shared internally and externally


**Quality and testning**
* Ensure quality and consistency across support responses and content
* Test new product features, automations and AI solutions before launch
* Identify issues and suggest practical improvements


**Required Skills**
* A hands-on and solution-oriented mindset
* Strong interest in AI, automation, and modern workflows
* Comfort working with both technical tools and operational tasks
* Structured way of working with attention to detail
* Good communication skills in English
* Ability to work independently while collaborating with others
* Fluency in English, both written and spoken.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
* Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
* Eagerness to learn and a proactive attitude.


 The internship will start from Aug 2026
   

  

****Who You Are****
 To excel in this role, you should embody Velory's core values and bring a creative, innovative spirit to our team:
   

  

* Show ownership: Look at the big picture and take the initiative to contribute where needed.
* Manage speed: Eliminate obstacles to maintain a high, sustainable pace.
* Represent quality: Aim high, sweat the details, and iterate.
* Earn trust: Be communicative, transparent, and follow through on commitments.
* Deliver wow: Go beyond expectations in a creative and unexpected way.


**What We Offer**
* A unique opportunity to grow and learn in a fast-paced scale-up environment.
* Hands-on experience in a fast-paced and innovative environment.
* A collaborative and inclusive work culture.
* Flexible work arrangements.
* Located in the vibrant city of Stockholm.


****Join Us****
 At Velory, you’ll be more than just an intern – you'll be a key player in our mission to revolutionize the digital landscape. If you’re ready to bring your creativity, skills, and passion to our team, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Graphic Design and Marketing - Internship
description:
*Are you a creative thinker who wants to turn ideas into visuals that make a real impact? Are you eager to build a standout portfolio while working in a fast-paced startup environment? Continue your growth at Grale, an award-winning green tech company redefining sustainable solutions.*
 Graphic Design Intern
   

  

 As a Graphic Design Intern at Grale, you’ll create content that brings our brand to life across multiple channels, contribute to the design of products that end up in the hands of millions, and create visuals that drive awareness and engagement. This is your chance to build a standout portfolio while making a real impact.
   

  

 You'll work side by side with our Marketing Manager, gaining hands-on guidance and insight into how we build and scale a brand in a fast-growing startup.
   

  

**What You’ll Get a Chance To Do**
* Create high-quality content within Grale’s visual identity for social media.
* Produce final artwork and assets for ads, campaigns and launches.
* Contribute to product design, shaping visuals that end up in the hands of customers.
* Support design and updates for our website, ensuring engaging user experience.
* Create illustrations, infographics, and motion graphics.
* Create content and design assets tailored for sales and customer interactions.
* Support with ad hoc design and content needs across the team.


**What You Bring**
* Strong design skills and eye for detail.
* Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite and CapCut or other video editing tool.
* A passion for content creation, storytelling, and digital trends.
* Experience in graphic design (studies, freelance, or internships).
* Motion design or 3D skills? Big plus!
* Comfortable acting in front of a camera? Even bigger plus.


**What you get:**
* The chance to be part of a fast-growing startup making measurable environmental impact.
* Work alongside award-winning founders featured on Forbes 30 under 30 and the Prince Daniel Fellowship.
* Shape a global business from the ground up.
* Beautiful, modern office in the heart of Stockholm.
* Free daily breakfast.
* Access to gym and health activities
* Weekly after work and a collaborative, high-energy culture.
* Opportunities for professional and personal development.


*Imagine a world free from microplastics where our planet thrives. At Grale, we’re not just imagining it - we’re building it. Plastics are made from petroleum and remain in our environment for thousands of years, while microplastics have already found their way into our oceans, food, and even our bodies. By 2050, there could be more plastic than fish in the sea. We’re here to change that - and we’re looking for passionate people to join us.*
*🏆 Grale has been awarded as the* 
***World’s Most Innovative Sustainability Startup***
*- selected from 1,400 companies globally*
*🥇 Ranked #13 on the Sifted 100:* 
***Fastest growing startups***
*in the Nordics & Benelux 2025*
*🏆 Awarded prestigious* 
***Global Tech Innovator***
*- chosen among 2,000 technology companies worldwide*
**Interested?**
*We are interviewing continuously with the aim of filling the position as soon as possible. Apply today to join a team shaping a sustainable future! 🌱*
*The internship is unpaid, full-time, and typically lasts for 6 months. We are flexible regarding the start date, with options to begin either in early May or early August, and can adapt the scope and duration based on your needs and performance.*

title: Senior Product Designer
description:
Join Scrive and be part of an international, fast-growing company headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden. Collaborate with smart, caring, and driven colleagues across Europe as we shape the Scrive story. 🚀
 



  





**The opportunity** 




 We are currently looking for a
 **Senior Product Designer** 
 to join our team and play a key role in shaping how thousands of businesses create, sign, and manage agreements. As a Senior Product Designer, you’ll own end-to-end user journeys across our core product surfaces. You will work closely with Product and Engineering to deliver high quality outcomes across the product portfolio, and contribute to the design system that ties it all together.
 



  





 📍 The role will be based in
 **Stockholm/Remote** 
 , and you will report to
 **Head of Product Design** 
 who is based in
 **Stockholm** 
 .
 



  





**As a Senior Product Designer you will:** 



* **Lead design for agreement management workflows** 
 – shaping how users create, send, track, and manage documents across the entire agreement lifecycle.
* **Design problem-solving features** 
 – designing features that solve real user and business problems, some of which will use AI, and your job is to translate complex or automated capabilities into clear, trustworthy user experiences.
* **Collaborate closely in a product trio** 
 – working alongside Product Management and Engineering from discovery through delivery, balancing user needs, business goals, and technical constraints.
* **Elevate our design foundations and team practices** 
 – contributing to the design system by extending components and defining patterns, while influencing product direction and raising the bar for the team through mentorship and design critique.



  





**What we’re looking for** 




 To succeed in this role, you should have:
 



  




* **5+ years of experience** 
 in product design, with a track record of owning complex, end-to-end user journeys.
* **Proven track record in B2B or workflow-heavy products** 
 - applying a systems mindset where you think in scalable patterns, not just individual screens.
* **Strong UX and visual design skills** 
 combined with a high proficiency in Figma.
* **Excellent communication and collaboration skills** 
 - enabling you to work cross-functionally and influence product direction effectively.
* **A forward-thinking approach** 
 - you are comfortable using AI to speed up the discovery and delivery of your work without losing sight of quality.
* **Proven ability to influence product direction and raise the quality bar across the team** 
 – using mentorship, critique, and strong design practices to shape how design work happens beyond your own scope.



  





 🌟
 **Bonus points if you have:** 



* **Industry knowledge:** 
 Familiarity with document management, contract workflows, or legal tech.
* **Design system expertise** 
 : Deep experience contributing to maintaining, or working within a comprehensive design system.



  





 In this role, we see that you demonstrate strong skills in
 **owning complex end-to-end user journeys** 
 ,
 **contributing to and scaling the design system** 
 ,
 **simplifying complex workflows into intuitive experiences** 
 , and
 **driving quality from discovery through delivery** 
 . These skills will play a key role in our assessment and discussions during the recruitment process.
 



  





*Don’t meet every single requirement? Apply anyway! Studies show that women and people from underrepresented groups are less likely to apply for jobs unless they meet every qualification. At Scrive, we value diverse perspectives and encourage anyone who is excited about this role to apply.*

title: 🍏 iOS Developer Internship: The Global Native Transition (Swift/SwiftUI)
description:
**FlavorScale is moving from Proof of Concept to Global Scale. While Flutter served us for our initial MVP, we are now architecting a high-performance Native iOS app designed to handle a worldwide rollout. We are looking for an iOS Developer Intern (or postgrad working student) to be a foundational architect of this new codebase.**
**We are building a native experience that will eventually live on the home screens of food-obsessed users from Tokyo to New York. You’ll work directly with the CTO and CEO to ensure FlavorScale is fast, fluid, and scalable.**
 Who You Are
   

  

* Background: Currently studying Computer Science or Software Engineering, or a postgrad/working student looking to add a "Global Scale" project to their portfolio.
* The Swift Craftsman: You live and breathe the Apple ecosystem. You have a deep understanding of Swift and SwiftUI and know exactly why Native is the only way to deliver a world-class user experience.
* Portfolio-Driven: You lead with your work. You have a GitHub or a portfolio of apps that demonstrate clean architecture, attention to detail, and a passion for mobile engineering.
* Scalability Mindset: You don't just build for 1,000 users; you think about 1,000,000. You want to write code that is modular, documented, and ready for internationalization.
* Vibe: You have the "Global Tech" energy. You’re not just a coder; you’re a builder who wants to see their work used in every major food city on the planet.


 Your Daily Mission
   

  

* The Native Rebuild: Work alongside the CTO to translate our MVP logic into a robust, native iOS architecture.
* World-Class UI: Use SwiftUI to build a buttery-smooth interface that sets the standard for discovery apps globally.
* API & Data Architecture: Connect our new native frontend to a backend designed for global traffic and high-velocity data flow.
* Performance Optimization: Ensure the app stays lightning-fast even as we add complex data visualizations and "Full-Flow" partner metrics.
* Feature Innovation: Propose and build native-only features (Haptics, Widgets, Advanced Maps) that elevate the user experience beyond the competition.


 The Opportunity
   

  

 This is a work-based internship or a "Masterclass" exercise for a postgrad. You are getting the rare opportunity to lead a
 **Native Transition for a global-facing startup.** 
 While we cannot promise permanent roles—as our key hires depend on the 2026/2027 investment cycles—this is our
 **Primary Engineering Pipeline.** 
 If you help us build the platform that conquers the industry, you will be the first candidate for our Lead iOS positions.
   

  

 Specific Requirements
   

  

* Location: Remote-First (Located within EU).
* Tech Stack: Strong proficiency in Swift and SwiftUI.
* Portfolio: Mandatory. We want to see the "why" and "how" behind your code.
* Status: Open to Bachelor/Master students or Working Students (Postgrads).
* Language: Fluent in English (Our global language).

title: Communication Specialist
description:
**Why Join Us?** 




 We’re on a mission to empower people with disabilities to do what they once did or never thought possible. As the world-leader in assistive communication solutions, we empower our customers to express themselves, connect with the world, and live richer lives.
 



  





 At Tobii Dynavox, you can grow your career within a dynamic, global company that has a clear, impactful purpose - with the flexibility to also do what truly matters to you outside of work. What’s more, you’ll be part of a work culture where collaboration is the norm and individuality is welcomed.
 



  





 As a member of our team, you’ll have the power to grow ideas in an unconventional environment. At the same time, you’ll work in a culture of ongoing learning and development, allowing you to constantly expand your area of expertise.
 



  





**About the Role:** 




 As a Communications Specialist at Tobii Dynavox, you will help create awareness about what we do at Tobii Dynavox and how we empower people with disabilities to have a voice together with our Marketing and Communications team. You will support both external and internal communications and collaborate closely with colleagues across the organization to deliver clear, consistent, and engaging communication that strengthens our brand, culture, and reputation.
 



  





**Please note:** 
 This is a full-time, permanent, and
 **hybrid** 
 role (2-3 days per week) at our office in
 **Östermalm, Stockholm.** 




  





**In this role, you will:** 



* Contribute to planning, execution, and continuous improvement of internal and external communication activities across internal and external channels, including intranet, website, and social media.
* Write, edit, and localize content for multiple audiences (i.e. employees, media, investors, customers) and publish content across platforms including the intranet, website and social media channels.
* Support content production (i.e. video, podcast, reports, etc.) and assist in planning and coordination of internal events and engagement activities.
* Conduct media monitoring of traditional and social media for relevant industry and company news. Support reporting on communication impact and earned media results.
* Maintain communication calendars, workflows, and asset libraries. Support continuous improvements in internal communication channels, structures, and user experience.



  





**What We're Looking For:** 




 This role suits a communications professional with a strong interest in
 **storytelling** 
 ,
 **content creation,** 
 and
 **operational excellence.** 
 You are
 **organized** 
 and
 **proactive** 
 ; you have a
 **solution-oriented** 
 and
 **hands-on** 
 approach
 **,** 
 and you enjoy bringing
 **structure** 
 to creative work. You communicate clearly,
 **collaborate** 
 easily with others, and feel comfortable working in a
 **hybrid, international organization** 
 with colleagues across different cultures and time zones.
 



  





 Excellent
 **interpersonal** 
 and
 **communication skills** 
 are essential to succeed in this role. If you’re eager to grow your skills, can manage multiple priorities within deadlines and enjoy contributing to clear, effective communication, we’d love to hear from you!
 



  





**Please note:** 
 If you have examples of previous work or a portfolio, please include these with your application.
 



**We are looking for someone that has:** 



* A bachelor’s degree (or equivalent) in Communications, Public Relations, Journalism, or a related field (preferred).
* 2–5 years of experience in communications-related roles, preferably within a publicly listed company, PR agency, or similar environment. Experience in financial communications is a plus.
* Experience creating and publishing content across digital platforms, such as intranet, CMS, and social media tools.
* Ability to work collaboratively while independently managing multiple tasks and meeting deadlines in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.
* Bilingual fluency in writing, editing, and spoken communication skills in both Business English and Swedish is needed for translation.



  





**Apply today!** 




 We believe in empowering individuals - including our own employees - to reach their full potential. So, if you want to change lives while growing your own career, we’d love to hear from you.
 



  





**Where we stand:** 




 We believe diversity not only enriches our workplace culture, but also gives us a strategic advantage. Working with people from a variety of backgrounds and perspectives helps us all become better communicators, better problem solvers, and better human beings. Our differences make us stronger.
 



  





 Tobii Dynavox values equality of opportunity, human dignity, and racial/ethnic and cultural diversity. Tobii Dynavox does not discriminate against individuals on the basis of race, color, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, religion, disability, age, veteran status, ancestry, or national or ethnic origin.
 



  





 Equal Opportunity Employer/AA Women/Minorities/Veterans/Disabled

title: Examensarbete/arbete inom webbutveckling
description:
**Söker du en plats för examensarbete / kandidatarbete inom webbutveckling? Bygg en skarp sajt med verkligt genomslag!** 




  





 Pluggar du IT, webbutveckling eller UX/UI och letar efter ett
 **examensarbete, kandidatarbete eller uppsatsprojekt till hösten 2026?** 




 Vi på Battle Tours erbjuder nu möjligheten att genomföra ditt examensarbete som ett
 **riktigt case – där ditt arbete faktiskt används i en växande verksamhet** 
 .
 



  





**Om oss** 




 Battle Tours arrangerar unika, militärhistoriska upplevelser, gruppresor och evenemang (t.ex. Normandie, Berlin, Örnnästet och andra historiska platser). Våra kunder är historieintresserade resenärer som vill uppleva krigshistorien på plats med resor ledda av expertguider.
 



  





**Om examensarbetet** 




 Projektet passar perfekt för dig som vill skriva om exempelvis:
 


* UX/UI och konverteringsoptimering
* SEO-struktur och organisk tillväxt
* Design av bokningsflöden
* Prestanda och modern webbarkitektur



  





 👉 Du får ett tydligt problem att lösa:
 



**Hur bygger man en webbplats som både rankar högt på Google och maximerar bokningar?** 




 Vi har redan gjort en affärs- och SEO-analys som du kan utgå från.
 



  





**Uppdraget** 



* Designa och/eller utveckla en ny hemsida
* Förbättra användarupplevelsen
* Implementera SEO-struktur
* Skapa tydliga konverteringsflöden



  





**Teknik (valbart inom ramar)** 




 Exempel:
 


* WordPress / headless CMS
* React / Next.js
* Webflow



  





 Vi är öppna för att projektet anpassas efter din utbildning och krav från universitetet.
 



  





**Vad du får** 



* Ett
 **examensarbete med verklig påverkan**
* Ett starkt case till din portfolio
* Möjlighet att arbeta datadrivet (SEO + konvertering)
* Referens + möjlighet till fortsatt samarbete efter studier



  





**Vi söker dig som:** 



* Läser en utbildning inom IT / webbutveckling / design
* Ska göra examensarbete / kandidatarbete
* Vill jobba med ett verkligt case (inte bara teori)
* Är självgående och nyfiken



  





**Praktiskt** 



* Kan genomföras remote
* Anpassas efter kurskrav och handledning
* Start: enligt terminsplan
* Caset/arbetet är obetalt.



  





**Intresserad?** 




 Skicka:
 


* Eventuellt CV och kort presentation
* Vad du studerar + nivå (kandidat/master)
* Eventuell portfolio/GitHub



  





 Till: nastasja@battletours.se senast den 25e maj 2026. Utvärdering av kandidater sker löpande.
 



  





 👉 Bonus: Intresse för historia är ett plus, men inget krav.

title: Senior Product Designer - Flights (Bangkok - Based, Relocation Provided)
description:
**About Agoda**
 At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.
   

  

 Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.
   

  

 No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.
   

  

**Get to Know Our Design Team:**
 The Design team is a diverse group of product designers and researchers that help to build Agoda’s products from our home office in Bangkok. Being a product-driven company, we constantly partner with product managers and engineers to understand user problems and design workflows, interactions, and visual interfaces.
   

  

 There is always an opportunity for growth here. Focus on your craft to improve or expand your skill set, or step into a managerial role and flex your talents as a designer and driver of team projects. This is a great time to join a team that’s small enough to be scrappy and hands on, yet big enough to influence change and product strategy.
   

  

 At Agoda, we offer a range of travel products – including accommodations, flights, and activities – and are building the next generation of travel experiences to help customers plan and book their entire trip. We’re looking for a
 **Senior Product Designer, Flights** 
 to help transform the way users search for, book, and manage flights.
   

  

 As a
 **Senior Product Designer, Flights** 
 , you’ll focus on end-to-end user journeys, leading the design of intuitive and engaging experiences that make every step from enabling users to discover, search, book and manage their flights seamlessly on Agoda. In this role, you’ll drive design strategy, collaborate closely with cross-functional teams, and ensure our flight products set the benchmark for usability and innovation in the online travel industry.
   

  

 In your day-to-day work, you’ll turn strategy into actionable design solutions by setting design direction, solving complex challenges, and delivering experiences that are intuitive, scalable, and grounded in user insights. You’ll champion user needs throughout the product lifecycle, using research and data to continuously refine our flight offerings.
   

  

**Experience Requirements & Role Expectations:**
* 6+ years of full-time experience as a product designer for digital or web-based products; in-house experience highly preferred.
* Create visually stunning, intuitive, and delightful interfaces, and independently deliver pixel-perfect UI and seamless interactions. You sweat the details and care deeply about craft.
* You are highly experienced in UI design, with deep knowledge of design patterns and a creative approach to solving problems through user interfaces.
* Proficient in both quantitative and qualitative research, with hands-on experience running user interviews, synthesizing findings, and generating actionable insights to inform design decisions.
* Take full ownership of the design process for a dedicated scrum, from discovery to delivery. You’ll set the design vision, define the user experience, and ensure high-quality execution.
* Partner with Product managers to shape product vision and roadmap. You’ll use data, research, and business context to inform your design decisions, always balancing user needs with business goals.
* Has experience of managing multiple stakeholders within an agile development process
* Strong communicator who can articulate design rationale, influence stakeholders, and build trust across disciplines.
* A strong portfolio of work that demonstrates your design thinking, process, and solutions showcasing beautiful, user-centered web and mobile product design.


**Day to day, it looks like:**
* Develop design solutions that address both business objectives and customer needs
* Manage and communicate with stakeholders to ensure alignment and on-time delivery of features
* Test prototypes and hypotheses with users to gather actionable feedback
* Present your work to peers and leadership, both asynchronously and in person
* Participate in weekly design critiques, workshops, all-hands, and team meetings
* Document your design process and clearly articulate your decisions
* Champion cohesion and consistency in UX design across our expanding suite of products and features
* Bring a strategic vision to implementing experiences that balance customer needs with business, content, and technology


**Senior Product Designer at Agoda means you have a track record of:**
* You work alongside your design partners in driving discovery and ideation workshops and align the group around a vision and approach
* You have a track record of crafting sophisticated flows and customer journeys
* You can think and craft at a system level, not just interface elements or pages
* You’ll regularly make use of your soft skills: listening, negotiating, decision-making
* You can balance multiple priorities and successfully deliver in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.


**Qualities we value in designers:**
* Effective articulation of ideas and design solutions
* Demonstrates initiative and proactively communicates
* Expressing feedback with kindness and candor
* Tolerance for ambiguity and healthy curiosity
* Translation of quantitative & qualitative insights into design decisions
* Contribution to our culture: motivation, optimism, quality, integrity


 #seattle #sanfrancisco #beijing #newyork #london #bangkok #singapore #chicago #hongkong #singapore #berlin #shanghai #losangeles #boston #austin #toronto #luxembourg #munich #oslo #copenhagen #stockholm #helsinki #brussels #hamburg #stuttgart #taipei #hamburg #stuttgart #dublin #telaviv #sydney #melbourne #perth #vancouver #montreal #prague #paris #dublin #telaviv #milan #rome #amsterdam #moscow #saintpetersburg #frankfurt #shenzhen #istanbul #dubai #kiev #seoul
   

  

 Please review our Hiring Process Guidelines before your interview — click here to learn how interviewing at Agoda works.
   

  

**Discover More About Working At Agoda**
* Agoda Careers https://careersatagoda.com
* Facebook https://www.facebook.com/agodacareers/
* LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/agoda
* YouTube https://www.youtube.com/agodalife


**Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Agoda, we pride ourselves on being a company represented by people of all different backgrounds and orientations. We prioritize attracting diverse talent and cultivating an inclusive environment that encourages collaboration and innovation. Employment at Agoda is based solely on a person’s merit and qualifications. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunity regardless of sex, age, race, color, national origin, religion, marital status, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, citizenship, veteran or military status, and other legally protected characteristics.
   

  

 We will keep your application on file so that we can consider you for future vacancies and you can always ask to have your details removed from the file. For more details please read our privacy policy.
   

  

**Disclaimer**
 We do not accept any terms or conditions, nor do we recognize any agency’s representation of a candidate, from unsolicited third-party or agency submissions. If we receive unsolicited or speculative CVs, we reserve the right to contact and hire the candidate directly without any obligation to pay a recruitment fee.

title: Senior Software Engineer – Axis Device Management SaaS, Lund
description:
**Job Title**
-------------


Senior Software Engineer – Axis Device Management SaaS, Lund**Job Description**
-------------------

*Are you a software developer who is passionate about* *creating great software products**? Now you have the opportunity to* *work with highly skilled colleagues at a world leading company! Join our team in Lund!*

  

**Y****our future team**


The line organization is responsible for the development of device management services with ACC(Axis Cloud Connect Platform), which have strategical importance and are used by a majority of Axis customers and partners worldwide. Device management SaaS, as part of ACC involves the device onboarding, provisioning, authenticating, configuring, maintaining, monitoring and diagnosing connected device operating as part of a surveillance system.


There are about 21 skilled and motivated engineers with great diversity and good team spirit.

**What you will do here as a Senior Software Engineer**


You will work in an autonomous agile team of 4-5 engineers. Your main tasks will be:

* Understand the requirements from product owner, design and develop full-stack solution(on edge, on cloud and front-end as well).
* Go and C# will be the main programming language, sprinkled with some Python.
* Cyber security will be one important aspect in your design and development work.
* The role has the possibility, at times, to go to conferences and customer meetings.

**Who are you?**

* Love to work hands on.
* Take responsibility for the tasks at hand, at the same time you are open to share and collaborate with others.
* Have energy and drive to contribute and learn, but still humble and easy to interact with.
* You are curious to understand the big picture and recognize the importance of networking with others inside and outside Axis.


Additionally, we prefer that you have the following background and skills:

* Bachelor or Master of Engineering in Computer Science or equivalent
* An agile mindset and understanding of DevOps and the value of early and automated testing.
* Experience in working in Linux development environment using various tools such as Git and Docker.
* Bonus points for experience with AWS cloud development.
* Bonus points for experience with databases, SQL and no-sqls. APIs such as REST, GraphQL.

**What Axis has to offer**


We are a world leader in network video, where cutting-edge technology meets global impact. Here, you’ll contribute to meaningful projects that shape the future of security and surveillance — developing solutions used worldwide. As a fast-growing company, we offer exciting career opportunities. You’ll grow professionally through continuous learning, supported by a collaborative team that values creativity, innovation, and work-life balance.

*Our Lund HQ Campus, including the impressive Grenden building, offers a dynamic environment with spaces crafted to encourage collaboration, whether through informal “**fika**” chats, formal meetings,* *or after-hours activities.* *Check it out:* *Axis HQ*


Your well-being matters to us. We offer a range of benefits, including a company bonus, Friday cake, wellness allowance, health insurance — and even your own Axis bicycle.


To learn more about Axis, our innovative products, solutions, and vibrant company culture, explore:  

Life at Axis blog  

Engineering at Axis blog  

Innovation at Axis

**Ready to Act?**  

Axis is a company realizing the benefits of a diverse workforce. We know that diversity in groups creates a better working environment and promotes creativity, something that is fundamental for our success. We welcome all applications.


We go through applications continuously so don’t wait – send in your application today!


In case of questions, please reach out to recruiting manager Xing Danielsson Fan at Xing.Danielsson.Fan@axis.com or at +46 46 272 18 00.

**Type of Employment**
----------------------


Permanent Employment**Posting End Date**
--------------------


2026-06-01*Certain roles at Axis require background checks, which means applicable verifications will be done in these recruitments.* *Notice will be provided before we take any action.*

**About Axis Communications**
-----------------------------


We enable a smarter, safer world by creating innovative solutions for improving security and business performance. As a network technology company and industry leader, we offer solutions in video surveillance, access control, intercom, and audio systems, enhanced by intelligent analytics applications.


With around 6000 committed employees in over 50 countries, we collaborate with partners worldwide. Together, we thrive in our friendly, open, and collaborative culture and inspire each other to think beyond the expected. United by our commitment to inclusion, diversity, and sustainability, we consistently seek to develop our skills and way of working.

**Let´s create a smarter, safer world**

For more information about Axis, please visit our website www.axis.com.


Listen to Get To Know Axis – Podcast
company_description: Axis Communications is a global growth company with currently are about 4000 employees worldwide and offices in over 50 countries. We are expanding. Visit our webb page axis.com

title: Automationstestare
description:
* Permanent
* Experienced Professionals
* Quality Engineering & Testing
* ID 470213-en\_US

På Sogeti tror vi att det bästa finns inom var och en av oss. Oavsett om du är i början av din karriär eller på toppen, kommer vi att uppmuntra dig att nå din högsta potential. Genom vår gemensamma passion för teknik, vår entreprenörskaps-anda och vårt fokus på kontinuerligt lärande, kommer vi att ge dig allt du behöver för att kunna bli den bästa versionen av dig själv.

  

Nyfiken? Superenkelt, pinga oss här https://www.sogeti.se/ping-uppsala/


Automationstestare
Om rollen


Har du ett stort intresse för testautomatisering och tycker om att lösa problem tillsammans med andra? Har du erfarenhet av att testa kod med olika verktyg och trivs i team där samarbete och kunskapsdelning är av högsta vikt? Då är det dig vi söker! Du kommer att få möjlighet att arbeta i uppdrag med både Sogetikollegor, branschkollegor och representanter från kund.

*I den här rollen kommer du vara en viktig del av teamet för att:*

* Designa, utveckla och implementera automatiserade tester
* Bygga upp och underhålla testramverk
* Genomföra API-testning och integrationstestning
* Bidra till effektiv testning och kvalitetssäkring i agila team
* Analysera testresultat och coacha utvecklingsteamet inom testområdet

  

Din profil


* Utbildning inom IT-området
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av testarbete inom testautomation
* Intresse för att hålla dig uppdaterad med de senaste trenderna inom testautomatisering och föreslå förbättringar av testprocessen
* Kunskap i något eller några programmeringsspråk till exempel: C#, JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, Java
* ISTQB-certifiering


Flytande svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift  

* 
* Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av
+ API-testning (t.ex. REST assured, Postman, SoapUI, Ready API)
+ GUI-testning med verktyg (t.ex. Selenium, Cypress, Playwright)
+ Prestanda- och lasttestning
+ Projekthanterings-/testmanagement-system (t.ex. Jira, Azure DevOps)
+ Att arbeta med CI/CD pipelines (t.ex. Jenkins, Azure DevOps)
+ Testramverk som tex xUnit, NUnit
+ Microsoft Services och SOAP/REST-baserade tjänster och verktyg

 *Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas:*

* *Innovativ miljö: Hos oss får du chansen att jobba med den senaste tekniken och vara en del av ett dynamiskt team som älskar att skapa värde genom innovation.*
* *Karriärutveckling: Vi bryr oss om din framtid och erbjuder utvecklingsprogram och certifieringar i de senaste teknologierna, så att du kan växa och bli den bästa versionen av dig själv.*
* *Flexibelt arbete: Vi förstår att livet är mer än bara jobb. Därför erbjuder vi möjligheter till distansarbete och flexibla arbetstider för att du ska må bra och trivas.*
* *Teamkänsla: Vi är som en stor familj med en härlig teamkänsla. Genom att leva efter våra värdeord som mod, passion, laganda och entreprenörskap - skapar vi en arbetsmiljö där alla kan trivas.*
*Om Sogeti*

*Sogeti Sverige, en del av Capgemini-koncernen, med 19 kontor och 1200 medarbetare, skapar affärsvärde med teknologi för organisationer som behöver införa innovation snabbt och som vill ha en lokal partner med global skalbarhet. Med en hands-on-kultur och närhet till kunderna, implementerar Sogeti lösningar som hjälper organisationer att arbeta snabbare, bättre och smartare. Genom att kombinera agilitet och snabb implementation via en DevOps-ansats, levererar Sogeti innovativa lösningar inom test- och kvalitetssäkring, molnet och systemutveckling, förstärkta av AI, data och automation.*
company_description: Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value.

title: Data Engineer
description:
Xylem is a Fortune 500 global water solutions company dedicated to advancing sustainable impact and empowering the people who make water work every day. As a leading water technology company with 23,000 employees operating in over 150 countries, Xylem is at the forefront of addressing the world's most critical water challenges. We invite passionate individuals to join our team, dedicated to exceeding customer expectations through innovative and sustainable solutions.


We are looking for an experienced Data Engineer to join Xylem Water Infrastructure R&D – Data & Insights. The role contributes to the design, evolution, and long-term sustainability of data platforms and analytics capabilities supporting R&D, field service, and customer-facing solutions.


The position is suited for an engineer with substantial experience working in complex data-driven environments, who brings strong technical judgment, architectural perspective, and the ability to contribute effectively within a team of skilled professionals. The role combines hands-on technical contribution with responsibility for shaping solutions that are robust, scalable, and maintainable over time.

**Key Responsibilities**
------------------------

* Design, build, and evolve data platforms and analytics solutions used in production.
* Improve existing data pipelines, models, and architectures to increase robustness, scalability, and maintainability.
* Work with data generated by physical products and systems, including time-series measurement data.
* Design, implement, and evolve stable and well-defined interfaces that enable integration with other products, platforms, and systems.
* Contribute to shared architectural patterns, principles, and technical guardrails.
* Collaborate with other engineering teams to deliver actionable insights and decision support capabilities, enabling users and customers to quickly understand the state of their systems through automated analysis of complex datasets.
* Evaluate and leverage next-generation technologies—including AI—where they create clear and sustainable value.

**Required Qualifications**
---------------------------

* Extensive experience as a Data Engineer or in a closely related engineering role, working with data platforms and analytics solutions in production environments.
* Strong engineering mindset, with experience working with data generated by physical products and systems, including time‑series and measurement data.
* Experience building and operating backend data applications or services in a cloud environment, including proficiency in web app development, working with API, and deploying cloud hosted solutions, for example on AWS.
* Experience working with time‑series and analytical data stores (e.g. InfluxDB and object storage such as S3), and integrating these with Python‑based analytics or data science workflows.
* Hands-on experience designing, building, and operating data pipelines or data platforms that are used beyond a single team or use case.
* Ability to make and explain architectural and technical decisions based on concrete constraints such as data quality, scale, performance, operability, and long-term maintenance.
* Experience evaluating and applying new technologies or techniques—including AI-based approaches—where they meaningfully improve capabilities

**Qualifications**
------------------

* Exposure to working in industrial domains with systems generating continuous measurement data of physical properties.
* Experience supporting or operationalizing advanced analytics or automated analysis, turning analytical outputs into actionable insights for users or customers.
* Experience working across the boundary between software engineering, data engineering, and data science, enabling analytics logic to be reliably integrated into production systems.
* Familiarity with designing solutions intended for reuse, where data products, interfaces, or insights are consumed by multiple teams or systems.
* Experience communicating complex technical topics clearly across teams, and supporting others through technical guidance, reviews, and collaborative problem-solving.

**Education**
-------------

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Data Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or a closely related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.

**Why Work at Xylem!**


We offer you a creative and international environment where you get the opportunity to focus on your personal and professional development together with committed and helpful colleagues. Engage as a volunteer through Xylem´s business program for community initiatives Xylem Watermark: www.xylemwatermark.com.

**Everyone's equal value**


We want people, regardless of skin color, age, disability, sexual orientation, and gender identity, to feel at home, not just at Xylem, but everywhere in the world. For us, diversity, equality, and inclusion mean more than just a policy or a set of methods. Diversity, equality, and inclusion are fundamental parts of our corporate culture and a key to long-term growth.


Feel free to visit us at https://www.xylem.com/sv-se/

**Application**


If you are interested in this position and would like to know more, please contact Leila Sayyad, Corporate Recruiter, **Leila.sayyad@xylem.com** .


Welcome with your application!


Join the global Xylem team to be a part of innovative technology solutions transforming water usage, conservation, and re-use. Our products impact public utilities, industrial sectors, residential areas, and commercial buildings, with a commitment to providing smart metering, network technologies, and advanced analytics for water, electric, and gas utilities. Partner with us in creating a world where water challenges are met with ingenuity and dedication; where we recognize the power of inclusion and belonging in driving innovation and allowing us to compete more effectively around the world.
company_description: Let's Solve Water!

title: Junior IT-konsult
description:
Trivs du med en varierad och utvecklande vardag med mycket kundkontakter? Då har vi jobbet för dig!


Vi är ett växande företag med kontor i Örnsköldsvik, Solna, Upplands Väsby och Uppsala som erbjuder våra kunder innovativa lösningar inom IT och digitalisering. Vi söker nu en Junior IT-tekniker och i denna roll kommer en stor del av jobbet utgå från våra kunder kring Stockholmsområdet. Hos oss kommer du vara del av ett team där du tryggt kan utvecklas och växa, både professionellt och personligt. Arbetsuppgifterna kommer vara variationsrika och utvecklande och du kan utvecklas vidare till andra roller över tid.


Rollen är bred och det förväntas att du är prestigelös, ansvarstagande, strukturerad och har förmågan att snabbt sätta dig in i nya system och tekniker. Du har ett starkt kundfokus och gillar att utveckla och underhålla kundernas IT miljö.

**Som Junior IT konsult hos oss kommer du bland annat jobba med:**

* Samarbeta med kollegor och leverantörer för att lösa incidenter och problem
* Ge support och rådgivning till användare och kunder
* Hjälpa våra kunder med deras IT behov och utmaningar

**Vi söker dig som har:**

* Kunskaper i M365
* Kunskaper i Active Directory / Azure AD
* Har grundkunskaper i felsökning Windows klienter
* Svenska, flytande i tal och skrift
* Engelska, goda kunskaper i tal och skrift
* B körkort och egen bil


Individuell, fast lön


Arbetstider: Dagtid, helgfri vardag

 **CoreIT– en del av Aderian Group**


Aderian utgörs av lokalt ledande bolag med lång erfarenhet och starka varumärken inom IT och applikationsdrift, infrastruktur, molntjänster, säkerhet och digitalisering till små och medelstora företag. Tillsammans är vi 650 anställda och omsätter cirka 1,7 miljard SEK.


Låter det intressant? Skicka in din ansökan redan idag!


  
**Ansvarig rekryterare**

title: Systemtekniker inom Nätverk
description:
Länsstyrelsernas IT-avdelning är i en spännande utvecklingsfas där digitalisering, innovativa lösningar och säkerhets- och beredskapsfrågor är i fokus. Vår IT-miljö är omfattande och varierande. Den innefattar allt från modern infrastruktur till system som vi utvecklar själva. Framför allt kommer våra idéer hela samhället till nytta. Det ger en alldeles speciell känsla som är svår att slå.


Länsstyrelsernas verksamhet har en stor bredd och verkar inom områden som är högst aktuella i dagens samhälle. Digitalisering är en stark drivkraft för länsstyrelserna där IT ofta har en nyckelroll i att realisera behoven.  

  

Länsstyrelsernas IT-avdelning är nationell och jobbar för samtliga 21 länsstyrelser i Sverige.

**Vill du bidra till att göra något viktigt för samhället och har goda kunskaper om större regionala nätverk? Vill du vara en del av ett engagerat och kompetent team med god sammanhållning? Då kan du vara vår nya systemtekniker inom nätverk!**

### **Om jobbet**


Just nu söker vi ytterligare en tekniker till vår nätverksgrupp som hanterar Länsstyrelsernas nationella nätverk. Jobbet är varierande och kan bestå av allt från daglig drift, säkerhetshöjande åtgärder och utveckling utifrån verksamhetsbehov. Som en del av vårt team får du bland annat:

* Delta i utvecklande projekt och uppdrag
* Arbeta med samhällskritisk infrastruktur
* Vara med och ta fram tekniska lösningar


Vi har som beredskapsmyndighet stort fokus på säkerhet i vårt arbete. Under en samhällsstörning samverkar, samordnar och stödjer länsstyrelsen länets aktörer så att konsekvenserna för samhället blir så små som möjligt. IT-leveranserna är en kritisk del både före, under och efter en pågående insats.

**Vad erbjuder vi?**  

Hos oss finns goda utvecklingsmöjligheter inom flera olika teknikområden. Du får möjlighet att specialisera dig inom området, men även ha en bredd i ditt arbete. Du ingår i en arbetsgrupp med god gemenskap och engagerade kollegor som trots geografisk spridning arbetar nära varandra med specialistkompetenser inom olika områden.


Länsstyrelsernas IT-avdelning finns över hela landet. Du kan välja placeringsort – Göteborg, Vänersborg, Mariestad, eller enligt överenskommelse. Vi erbjuder ett flexibelt arbete med goda möjligheter till distansarbete del av arbetstiden. Resor inom landet förekommer.

### **Om dig**


Vi söker dig som tar ansvar, har ett flexibelt förhållningssätt och är bekväm med förändringar då arbetsuppgifterna varierar. Att arbeta mot gemensamma mål känns självklart för dig och du trivs med att göra detta i samarbete med dina kollegor. Du behöver även kunna uttrycka dig väl i tal och skrift och ser dokumentation som en naturlig del av arbetet. Din förmåga att ta egna initiativ är god och du har ett genuint driv att vilja lära och utvecklas i ditt arbete.

**Dina erfarenheter**


För att lyckas som systemtekniker hos oss behöver du ha goda kunskaper inom switching, routing och brandväggar. Du har erfarenhet av att arbeta med drift och förvaltning av nätverk och har aktuell kunskap inom området. Du har högskoleutbildning inom IT, alternativt arbetsrelaterad erfarenhet som anses likvärdig. För den här tjänsten krävs B-körkort.


Vi ser det som meriterande om du har erfarenhet av containerteknik, automatisering, datacenternätverk, nätverksvirtualisering och Linux-baserade system.


Vi fäster stor vikt vid den personliga lämpligheten och ser det som självklart att du bidrar till ett gott arbetsklimat. Som medarbetare på Länsstyrelsen Västra Götaland ska du också leva upp till den Den statliga värdegrunden - Statskontoret.


Vi tror på allas lika möjligheter och ett av våra huvuduppdrag är att verka för mångfald och en personalsammansättning som speglar länens befolkning.

### **Bra att veta**


Du söker jobbet via denna länk: Ansök här


Välkommen med din ansökan!


Läs mer om oss på vår webb Jobba på IT-avdelningen. Här finns information om våra förmåner. Vi finns också på Linkedin.


I den här rekryteringen vill vi inte att du bifogar något personligt brev. För att berätta om dina erfarenheter och förmågor får du i din ansökan svara på ett antal frågor. Detta är för att vi ska kunna ta ställning till i vilken omfattning din kompetens och dina förutsättningar matchar vårt behov. Ansökan ska vara på svenska då det är vårt arbetsspråk.


Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhetsmedvetenhet. Säkerhetsprövning enligt Säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) kommer att genomföras innan vi fattar beslut om anställning. För en del anställningar kan därför svenskt medborgarskap komma att krävas. Läs mer om säkerhetsprövning Personalsäkerhet - Säkerhetspolisen (sakerhetspolisen.se). Vi har valt rekryteringskanaler och vill inte bli kontaktade av rekryteringsföretag.


Anställningen kan komma att inledas med 6 månaders provanställning.


Vi har valt rekryteringskanaler och vill inte bli kontaktade av rekryteringsföretag


Länsstyrelsen är en beredskapsmyndighet och har ett särskilt utpekat ansvar under kris och krig/höjd beredskap.


Din ansökan blir en allmän handling när du söker tjänster hos oss. Därför är det viktigt att du med skyddade personuppgifter inte registrerar dig via vårt rekryteringssystem. Posta din ansökan till HR-enheten, Länsstyrelsen Västra Götaland, 403 40 Göteborg. Delge inte några känsliga uppgifter i din ansökan men ange någon form av kontaktuppgift så att vi kan kontakta dig om du är aktuell för tjänsten. Vid frågor, ta kontakt med rekryterande chef som står med i annonsen.
