title: MarTech Specialist
description:
At Electrolux Professional Group we hire to meet needs beyond tomorrow!
  

  

UNLOCK YOUR POTENTIAL
  

  

At Electrolux Professional Group, we believe potential powers progress. We’re not searching for perfection—we’re looking for people with the right mindset.
  

If you're curious, resilient, and ready to grow, you'll find the space to lead, innovate, and together with us. Meet the needs beyond tomorrow.
  

https://www.electroluxprofessionalgroup.com/en/join-us/
  

  

**MARKETING TECHNOLOGY SPECIALIST**

WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING


We are looking for a Marketing Technology Specialist to strengthen our global marketing organization supporting 21 brands across multiple Business Areas. This role will shape and streamline our marketing technology landscape, enabling teams to work in a more data ‑ driven, automated, and efficient way.  

  

  

As the fourth strategic hire in the Group Marketing team, your focus will be on MarTech and technology ‑ driven enablement. You will work closely with Brand, Digital Marketing, Social Marketing, IT, and the Business Areas, ensuring the right tools, platforms, and data are in place to support our global marketing goals.


KEY RESPONSIBILITIES


* Support the effective use of marketing technologies across brands and markets, ensuring consistency and scalability.
* Defining KPIs to measure MarTech adoption, usage, and impact.
* Act as a Group reference for MarTech topics related to content, assets, and activation, including Digital Asset Management (DAM).
* Ensure that the Digital Asset Management (DAM) system is well structured, governed, and adopted, enabling easy reuse and activation of assets across markets.
* Provide Group‑level frameworks, guidelines, and best practices to support country‑led campaigns, while execution remains in local training and enablement activities.
* Tool onboarding for the local team.
* Support performance reading, learning loops, and sharing best practices across markets.
* Contribute to Group MarTech projects by translating marketing needs into structured use cases and supporting tool adoption.
* Collaborate closely with Group Brand and Digital Marketing, Digital Transformation, IT, agencies, and local teams to improve workflows and operational efficiency.

TOOLS YOU’LL WORK WITH


* Google Analytics
* CRM: Salesforce
* CMS: Wordpress Marketing Automation / Marketing
* Cloud Digital Asset Management (DAM)
* Data visualization and reporting toolsgoals.

WHAT’S NEEDED FOR YOU TO THRIVE


* Few years of experience in a similar role.
* Knowledge of Salesforce, ideally Marketing Cloud, and an understanding of how it fits into a broader MarTech ecosystem.
* Strong understanding of analytics, tracking, automation, and marketing platforms.
* Structured, analytical, and results ‑ driven, with a curious mindset.
* Ability to work cross ‑ functionally in a global environment and structure initiatives, coordinate stakeholders, and follow delivery.
* Experience from an industrial or manufacturing environment is a plus.
* Fluent in English.

OUR GUIDING PRINCIPLES


Be Customer Obsessed. Build Trust. Be Bold. Act Sustainably.


We’re building it every day — and we’d love your help.  

  



WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU


Trust, ownership, and the opportunity to grow.


* Be part of a company grounded in customer focus, sustainability leadership, innovation, and social impact. We aim to Meet Needs Beyond Tomorrow.
* The possibility to work hybrid and build a flexible work-life balance.
* Be part of an industry shift that makes a difference in how people live, cook, clean, care, and serve.
* Plus: country-specific perks and benefits designed to support your well-being.

To be eligible for this role, you must already have the legal right to work in Sweden. We are unable to offer work permit sponsorship.

title: Senior Compensation Partner
description:
**ABOUT SINCH**

Sinch is pioneering the way the world communicates. More than 150,000 businesses — including Google, Uber, Paypal , Visa, Tinder, and many others — rely on Sinch’s Customer Communications Cloud to power engaging customer experiences through mobile messaging, voice, and email.


Whether you need to verify users or craft omnichannel campaigns, Sinch makes it easy. Our AI-infused Super Network, APIs, and applications ensure you can connect with your customers reliably and securely, at every step of their journey.


At Sinch we “Dream Big”, “Win Together”, “Keep it simple”, and “Make it Happen”. These values are our foundation!


**DESCRIPTION**

Sinch is looking for a Senior Compensation Partner that is a seasoned individual contributor responsible for designing, analyzing, and administering compensation programs that support the organization’s talent strategy. This role operates with a high degree of autonomy, influences cross-functional stakeholders, and provides expert guidance on compensation philosophy, market competitiveness, and pay equity.


**Key Responsibilities:**

· Lead the design, implementation, and continuous improvement of compensation programs, including base salary, incentive plans and bonuses.


· Partner with HR leadership and business stakeholders to align compensation programs with organizational goals.


· Conduct advanced market pricing, benchmarking, and competitive analysis using survey data and internal insights.


· Maintain and enhance job architecture, leveling frameworks, and salary structures.


· Perform complex analyses such as pay equity, internal parity, and cost modeling to support decision-making.


· Develop dashboards, reports, training and presentations to communicate compensation insights to leadership.


· Support annual compensation cycles (merit and bonus planning)


· Ensure compliance with all applicable compensation regulations and support audits, reporting, and policy documentation.


· Serve as a trusted advisor to HRBPs and business leaders, providing guidance on offers, promotions, and complex compensation scenarios.


**Qualifications:**

· Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources , Business, Finance, Economics, or related field .


· 6–10+ years of progressive experience in compensation or total rewards.


· Deep knowledge of compensation principles, job evaluation methodologies, and market data.


· Advanced analytical skills with proficiency in Excel (e.g., modeling, pivot tables, data analysis).


· Experience with compensation tools and HRIS systems (e.g., Oracle, Workday, SAP, or similar).


· Strong communication skills with the ability to present to senior stakeholders.


**Preferred**

· Certified Compensation Professional (CCP) or similar certification.


· Experience supporting global or multi-state compensation programs.


· Familiarity with pay equity analysis and regulatory requirements (e.g., pay transparency laws).


· Experience with data visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI)  



**OUR HIRING PROCESS**

We are committed to ensuring a recruitment process that is fair, objective, consistent, and inclusive. Our approach includes structured, competency-based interviews designed to evaluate your skills, experience, and qualifications relevant to the role. At times, we may include a data-driven assessment to enhance our hiring success and identify candidates likely to excel.


We believe in a two-way process and encourage you to ask questions throughout the journey. If this role isn't what you're looking for, please explore the other opportunities listed on our career page: https://www.sinch.com/careers/ . No matter who you are, we hope you find an exciting path forward - hopefully with us!
company_description: We help companies to communicate with customers via messaging, voice and video using multiple channels. Simplifying life by bringing all people and businesses together using technology is our purpose.

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
Are you looking to begin or further develop your career in sales? Nimblr is growing and is now seeking a Sales Development Representative (SDR) to join our team in Malmö. In this role, you will support sales executives by generating and qualifying leads, booking meetings, and contributing to a more efficient and structured sales process. It’s an ideal position for someone keen to enter the world of B2B cybersecurity sales, gain hands-on experience, and learn from seasoned professionals. You’ll be part of a collaborative and ambitious environment where you can build the skills and foundations for a long-term career in sales.
  
  

Key Responsibilities ️
  
Identify and connect with potential customers through outbound activities, with a strong focus on cold calling.
  
  

Qualify leads by understanding customer needs, challenges, and decision-making processes.
  
  

Book high-quality meetings for our sales executives, helping to build a strong and consistent pipeline.
  
  

Work with Nimblr’s sales cadence while testing, learning, and refining your own outreach approach.
  
  

Maintain accurate and updated records of all activities in our CRM system, Hubspot.
  
  

Collaborate closely with senior sales colleagues, making the most of coaching, feedback, and shared learnings.
  
  

Build foundational knowledge in B2B sales and cybersecurity to communicate value effectively to prospects.
  
  

Play an active role in shaping a positive, ambitious, and supportive team environment.
  
  

What we are looking for
  
You have experience from a B2C or B2B sales or customer-facing role, with a clear motivation to develop within sales.
  
  

Comfortable working with high activity levels, ideally with experience in outbound calling, telemarketing, customer service, or similar sales roles.
  
  

You have strong communication skills in both Swedish and English, and are comfortable holding professional and engaging conversations.
  
  

Good interpersonal skills, with the ability to adapt your approach based on the customer and situation.
  
  

A resilient and positive mindset, with persistence, curiosity, and a genuine drive to succeed and grow in a sales career.
  
  

Nice to have➕
  
  

Additional language skills beyond Swedish and English.
  
  

Interest in technology or cybersecurity.
  
  

What We Offer
  
A chance to learn directly from senior sales colleagues with proven experience.
  
  

A dynamic, collaborative environment with a strong company culture.
  
  

Opportunities to grow professionally and take on new challenges.
  
  

Freedom to improve processes and make an impact on how we work —your input truly matters.
  
  

The chance to work at the forefront of cybersecurity, helping protect businesses worldwide.
  
  

A close-knit team of founders who are passionate about what they do.
  
  

At Nimblr, we believe in taking care of our team. Beyond a competitive salary- and commission model, we offer a wide range of perks designed to support your well-being, growth, and work-life balance. Enjoy flexibility, Give-Me-A-Break-Day, wellness hours, and the chance to work from one of our offices across Europe
  
  

Who are we?
  
Nimblr has offices and employees across all Nordic countries, as well as in Portugal, the Baltics, Poland, and Vietnam, with a talented team of nearly 70 people. The company is in a fast and exciting growth phase. Nimblr offers a cloud-based platform for cybersecurity training, built on expertise in IT security, e-learning, and behavioural psychology. Our engaging training equips employees with the skills and knowledge needed to strengthen resilience against potential cyber threats.
  
Apply now
  
Does this sound like the challenge you are looking for? Don't miss this opportunity – we look forward to receiving your application.
  
  

We apply a probationary period in accordance with national laws and regulations.

title: Client Support Assistant
description:
Hi there!
  
Own the client experience, start to finish
  
At Eliq, we build products that make energy consumption data meaningful — for utilities and millions of end users. As a Client Support Specialist, you'll be the person our clients rely on when something isn't working. You own each case from first contact through to resolution, making sure clients feel heard, informed, and confident the whole way through.
  
This is a hands-on, early-career role where you keep clients moving, communicating clearly, coordinating across teams, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks. You'll be part of the Delivery team, reporting to the Head of Delivery, and work closely with Service Delivery Managers, Product, and Engineering.
  
What You'll Do
  
**Client Experience Ownership:** Be the main point of contact when clients have issues. Set clear expectations, keep them updated, and make sure they always know where things stand.
  
**Resolution & SLA Management:** Own support cases end-to-end — from intake to closure — ensuring every client gets a timely resolution within agreed service levels (SLAs).
  
**Clear Communication:** Translate what's happening technically into plain, honest updates clients can act on. No jargon, just clarity.
  
**Internal Coordination:** Work with Product and Engineering to investigate and drive issues to resolution. Be the client's advocate inside the company.
  
**Smart Escalation:** Know when to escalate, and make sure escalations are crisp and move quickly.
  
  

Who You Are
  
Client-first by nature — you take it personally when a client's experience isn't good, and you don't let go until it's resolved.
  
A calm, clear communicator who can manage expectations under pressure without overpromising.
  
Comfortable taking ownership and following through without needing constant direction.
  
Professional proficiency in English required
  
Around 1–3 years of experience in a support, account management, or client-facing role — preferably in a tech or SaaS environment.
  
Comfortable working with technical systems and documentation — you don't need to be an engineer, but you're not afraid of digging in.
  
  

Bonus If You Bring
  
Experience in B2B SaaS or a technical product environment.
  
Familiarity with ticketing or CRM tools.
  
Basic exposure to SQL or APIs for troubleshooting.
  
Exposure to cloud platforms like Azure.
  
Swedish is a plus; other European languages welcome
  
  

Why This Role
  
Work on a product that contributes to real-world climate impact.
  
High ownership with clear visibility of your impact on clients and product quality.
  
Learn fast by working across Support, Product, and Engineering.
  
  

**About Eliq:**  

Eliq is a leading company in the energy insights space , serving 30+ utilities across 13 European markets. Founded in 2015, Eliq is a VC-backed business with approximately 50+ employees. We are dedicated to improving the way energy is used by making sense of the world’s energy data, enabling businesses to build digital energy products and users to avoid energy wastage. Join us in fast-tracking the planet’s transition to net zero.

title: Head of Networks and Infra Supply Chain and Sourcing
description:
**Head of Network & Infrastructure Sourcing**

We’re looking for a **Head of Network & Infrastructure Sourcing** to join us at Telia.


I’m Christian Linhart, Chief Procurement Officer for Telia Group. We have the vision to build up the best Procurement team for a Telecom operator in the Nordics and a strongly respected Procurement organization across all industries.
  

To strengthen our successful team even further, I’m searching for a senior leader ready to take end‑to‑end responsibility for sourcing and supplier management across Telia’s network and infrastructure landscape.
  

In this role, you will be a member of the Procurement Leadership Team, shaping sourcing strategies for some of Telia’s most critical and high‑value technology domains.


You will join a leadership team focused on resilient, cost‑efficient and future‑ready connectivity across critical network and infrastructure environments.


The position location is Solna, Sweden.


**What you’ll do**

As Head of Network & Infrastructure Sourcing, you will define and lead the sourcing strategy for Telia’s network and infrastructure categories, closely partnering with Technology, Security and Business stakeholders across the Group.


* **Own and drive the sourcing strategy** for network and infrastructure domains across Telia Group
* **Lead and develop senior sourcing team** , responsible for large‑scale, complex technology categories
* **Act as a strategic partner to Technology and Network leaders** , aligning commercial, technical and transformation priorities
* **Manage critical supplier ecosystems** , including strategic vendors, partnerships, negotiations and long‑term agreements
* **Drive commercial excellence** , value creation, cost efficiency and risk management across infrastructure spend
* **Support major transformations** , including network modernization, virtualization, cloud and automation initiatives
* **Contribute as a member of the Procurement Leadership Team** , influencing Group‑level strategy, governance and ways of working

**What will help you thrive in this role**

You are a senior, credible sourcing leader with deep understanding of network and infrastructure environments, comfortable operating at both strategic and executive levels.


* Proven leadership experience within network, infrastructure, or technology sourcing in telco environment (CPO or Head of Network Procurement role experience or similar at a leading Telecom operator recommended)
* Strong understanding of network technologies and infrastructure platforms, enabling effective dialogue with technical stakeholders
* Solid track record managing large, complex supplier landscapes and high‑value commercial negotiations
* Experience working at Group or multi‑country level, balancing local needs with global strategy (international experience, including markets outside the Nordics, is beneficial)
* Ability to combine strategic thinking with execution discipline, drive change and challenge legacy sourcing models, and build best‑in‑class tendering and competition practices
* Strong stakeholder management skills, including interaction with executive leadership teams
* Fluency in English (Telia footprint languages is a plus)

**Join us to shape smarter living for people, businesses, and the planet**

At Telia, we’re a team of 15,000 colleagues across the Nordics and Baltics, passionate about technology and connectivity. As a leading telecommunications operator and climate leader, we work with large‑scale, business‑critical platforms that truly matter to society.
  

Overall Sweden, the Nordics and the Baltics are globally leading in digital practices and have a strong ecosystem of world-class suppliers. We in Telia as well as the region are a clear innovation leader, which makes the work in network and infrastructure even more exciting.


Here, you’ll have the opportunity to shape sourcing strategies for core infrastructure that underpins everyday life — while growing as a leader in a collaborative and inclusive environment.


**What we offer**

When you join us, you’ll receive a competitive executive‑level compensation package tailored to your local market, flexible ways of working, and performance‑based incentives. Most importantly, you’ll have the mandate to influence Telia’s network and infrastructure strategy at Group level.


**Ready to make better happen?**

We look forward to receiving your application **in English** **by 15th of May, 2026** . Please note that we may close the position earlier if we find the right candidate.


Want to know more about this role? Please contact **Helen Väljaste, Talent Acquisition Partner – Executive Search** at **helen.valjaste@telia.ee** . Background and reference checks will be part of the process.


**Equal opportunities**

At Telia, we recognize talent by **professional skills and growth potential** . We champion diversity and inclusion regardless of gender, age, nationality, disability, sexual orientation or background. Your uniqueness is our strength.


**Join us and let’s make better happen – together!**

title: Store Manager till 3Butiken Marieberg (Vikariat)
description:
Vi står nu redo att välkomna nästa ledare till 3Butiken Marieberg i Örebro. 3Butikerna är en av Tres viktigaste kanaler när det kommer till att skapa nöjda och lojala kunder. I den här rollen får du möjlighet att jobba med coaching och teamutveckling, driva försäljning och skapa resultat tillsammans med andra.
  
  

Detta är ett längre vikariat på upp till 3 år då nuvarande Store Manager vidareutbildar sig – en unik möjlighet att under en längre period leda och utveckla butiken.
  
  

En dag som Store Manager
  
  

Jag heter Akam och är affärsområdesansvarig för våra 3Butiker. Som din närmsta chef ser jag fram emot att jobba tillsammans med dig! En dag i 3Butik är händelserik och varierad, och jag vill gärna ge dig en inblick i hur det kan se ut.
  
  

Dagen börjar med att du och teamet säkerställer att butiken är inbjudande och redo att välkomna kunder. Du sätter upp försäljningsmål, planerar dagen och håller dig uppdaterad om de senaste produktlanseringarna och kampanjerna. Kanske har du senare ett möte med mig, för att gå igenom resultat och fokusområden eller ett utvecklingssamtal med en medarbetare. Snart är det dags att möta dagens första kund och tillsammans med teamet skapa en förstklassig upplevelse.
  
  

Mer om rollen
  
  

Som Store Manager är du en närvarande och operativ ledare med fullt ansvar för både personal och butikens dagliga drift. Du leder genom att vara på plats i butiken, coachar teamet i kundmötet och visar riktningen genom att själv möta och sälja till våra kunder. Rollen innebär ett tydligt mandat och ett stort eget ansvar, där du skapar trygghet och närvaro för både medarbetare och kunder, även under helger. Du är en del av ett starkt butikskluster med nära till fysiskt stöd, vilket ger dig goda förutsättningar att lyckas. Ersättningen är direkt kopplad till både din egen försäljning och butikens prestation.
  
  

Vi erbjuder dig
  
  

Att vara en del av en fantastisk företagskultur, med ett stort nätverk och nära kontakt till hela vår säljorganisation.
  
Tre är en arbetsplats där individuell utveckling och intern rörlighet är ett av våra stora fokusområden. Med hjälp av drivna medarbetare, engagerade ledare och våra interna utbildningar ger vi dig förutsättningar att växa på Tre.
  
En möjlighet att vara en del av att leverera kritisk infrastruktur och bidra direkt till samhällsnyttan.
  
Att vara en del av en av Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser där vi sätter våra medarbetare i fokus samt att vi är stolt samarbetspartner till Women in Tech och Tjejer Kodar.
  
Några av våra medarbetare
  
Julia Maxén
  
Gruppchef
  
"Jag vill att mitt team ska få de bästa förutsättningarna för att göra sitt jobb på bästa sätt. Det är så vi utvecklar oss som team, men även utvecklar Tre framåt."
  
Henrik Sundvall
  
Digital projektledare
  
"Det absolut bästa med att vara projektledare på Tre är jag får jobba brett med kollegor från alla delar av organisationen och få lära mig nya saker varje dag. Jag har friheten att vara mig själv – och bli uppskattad för det!"
  
Jayasri Battola
  
Utvecklare
  
"The great work culture and the technology made me choose Tre. Working alongside great people in mixed team setups, with both experienced and new talents, along with the latest and greatest tools and technologies like Cloud and Azure."
  
  

Mer om dig
  
  

Om vi får gissa är du någon som har erfarenhet av att arbeta inom service och försäljning. Kanske besitter du en ledande roll idag, eller så är du en informell ledare och är redo för ditt nästa kliv i karriären. Oavsett så tror vi att du drivs av att ta ansvar, påverka och skapa framgång tillsammans med ditt team.
  
  

Som person har du en naturlig förmåga att bygga relationer och inspirera din omgivning. Med ditt driv och din struktur håller du alltid kursen mot målet, samtidigt som du ser till att vägen dit är både effektiv och utvecklande, för både dig själv och andra. Du älskar att lösa problem, hitta möjligheter och göra det där lilla extra som gör skillnad. I en snabbföränderlig miljö trivs du som bäst, där tempot är högt och resultaten tydliga. Att nå mål är en självklarhet för dig, men du vet också att framgång skapas tillsammans.
  
  

Välkommen med din ansökan
  
  

Låter det här som något för dig? Vad glada vi blir!
  
  

Vi tar emot ansökningar via denna annons och kommer hålla intervjuer löpande. Personligt brev behövs inte, men vi vill gärna att du bifogar CV och svarar på några frågor i samband med att du söker. Vi tror på din potential och dina förmågor, och för att säkerställa en rättvis och objektiv urvalsprocess använder vi tester som en del av vår bedömning. Tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag. Bakgrundskontroll genomförs på slutkandidat.
  
  

Vi har riktigt bra förmåner
  
  

Friskvårdsbidrag, föräldrarlön, pension & försäkringar enligt kollektivavtal
  
  

Flexibla helgdagar och fem dagar extra ledigt per år
  
  

Hundzon & gym i 3huset
  
  

Subventionerad lunch
  
  

Förmånliga rabatter på cyklar, kollektivtrafik och elbilar
  
  

Generösa bonusmodeller eller provisioner
  
  

Vi drivs av att hela tiden försöka göra saker bättre, på nya och annorlunda sätt. Vi ser oss själva som en avgörande del av Sveriges samhällsstruktur, eftersom vi vet att pålitlig uppkoppling är en viktig grundsten i dagens digitala värld.
  
  

Tre föddes som utmanare och är en organisation i ständig rörelse. Vi strävar efter att vara i framkant i allt vi gör. Vi är övertygade om att det är människorna och kulturen på Tre som är avgörande för vår utveckling.
  
  

När du startar din resa på Tre finns det oändliga möjligheter att växa och utvecklas med oss.
  
  

WE THINK LIKE CHALLENGERS - I en föränderlig värld, är vi på Tre nyfikna och ständigt öppna för nya lösningar. På Tre anpassar vi vägen framåt allt eftersom vi provar och lär oss vad som funkar bäst.
  
  

WE WORK LIKE CHAMPIONS - På Tre gör vi alltid vårt bästa. Vi känner ägandeskap för vår uppgift, sätter tydliga mål och håller fokus på det som gör mest nytta för affären.
  
  

WE ACT LIKE BUDDIES - På Tre är vi schyssta kollegor. Vi samarbetar med varandra över team och funktioner, vi bollar idéer, ger och tar emot feedback.
  
  

Enable "functional cookies" to watch the video
  
  

2003
  
Tre först i Sverige med videosamtal och strömning av mobil video. Att se personen som du ringer upp i ögonen är en helt ny upplevelse vid den här tidpunkten.
  
  

2006
  
Tre lanserar mobilt bredband som tredje operatör i världen. Under de kommande fem åren vinner Tre pris för Sveriges snabbaste mobila bredband.
  
  

2013
  
Tre’s systerbolag Hallon startas med en vision att vara den enkla mobiloperatören utan onödigt krångel.
  
  

2019
  
Ett händelserikt år! 3Världen lanseras som innebär att kunder kan surfa i 80 länder till samma pris som inom Sverige. Därefter lanseras 3Samla som gör att alla kunder kan lägga till fler användare till sitt abonnemang och sist men inte minst är Tre först i Sverige med ett lansera ett publikt 5G-nät.
  
  

2025
  
Tele2 Arena byter från 1 januari namn till 3Arena. Med vår starka passion för innovation, uppkoppling och upplevelser ska vi medverka till arenans och områdets utveckling.

title: Vice President, Research & Development (Hardware & Software)
description:
### **JOB DESCRIPTION**



**Company Story**



Sigma Connectivity is a global tech house with all the resources needed to bring a product to market under one roof. We believe in investing in knowledge and education, making a positive impact on society and shaping a brighter future for all.



Through our core values, at Sigma Connectivity we create an environment that fosters growth, creativity, and collaboration. Our company culture promotes the freedom to explore new ideas and push the boundaries of what is possible.



Working with us means you will be working in an international environment with a diverse and inclusive atmosphere. We operate globally from 12 sites and have expert teams in North America, Sweden, Germany, Denmark, United Kingdom and Poland.



**Role purpose**



The Vice President of R&D leads the company’s **hardware and software development organization**, ensuring high‑quality customer delivery while building long‑term technical capability and organizational strength. The role owns R&D strategy, execution, and people leadership in a consultancy environment where flexibility, technical excellence, and customer trust are critical.



What you will be a part of:



This is a chance to be part of a skilled, hard-working and helpful team in an open-minded environment! Our approach is based on our core value: “You never work alone!” meaning that everyone should be successful in their work.



You will lead a dynamic team of managers with responsibility for areas like PCB Design, Android Device Software development, Edge Device Development, Radio and Antenna development, etc.



Your team is in our HQ in Lund. You will work with different projects closely together with the team members and various stakeholders within the organization, as well as customers. As a leader, you will drive and motivate a highly experienced team, and you will encourage them to take personal responsibility. You define individual and organization goals for all team members and support them to succeed in their daily work.



You will report to the CEO and be a member of the Senior leadership team, you work strategically together with your fellow colleagues.



The main tasks are:



Working together with Sales across Market Units to build strong customer and partner relationships.



Be part of Customer discussions, Quotation work and Project steering group to secure quality of delivery including accurate Quotations. Be part of pricing discussions with sales organization.



Responsible for Budget and Gross Margin for R&D.



Ability to provide strategic input for overall R&D development department to engineers, Sales and Senior Managers.



Manage line activities including performance management, salary reviews, competence and development.



Responsible for Recruiting and Building High performance teams.



Together with colleagues, set and drive long term strategic goals for the organization (eg AR/VR) and engage with partners.



Approximately 20 travelling days per year, mostly within Sweden and Europe is part of the job.



**Key outcomes**



* Strong Customer relationship and efficiently winning new business
* Strong gross margin and building high performing team.
* Building growth culture with high engagement from all employees.
* Clear technical direction and continuous modernization of development practices
* Strong leadership scalable and flexible engineering organization
* Effective use of labs and verification capabilities as a differentiator.


**Responsibilities**



**Strategy and capability development**



* Define and execute R&D strategy across hardware and software, aligned with company objectives
* Build long‑term technical capabilities in core domains such as embedded systems, connectivity, cloud, mobile platforms, electronics, antenna/RF, and verification
* Ensure software and hardware offerings are clearly positioned and well understood internally and externally


**Delivery and execution**



* Own technical delivery across customer engagements, ensuring quality, scope control, and customer satisfaction by working closely with Project Management Office.
* Oversee staffing, utilization, and capacity planning across hardware and software teams
* Drive structured collaboration between hardware and software organizations


**Engineering excellence**



* Promote strong engineering standards, architecture, and best practices and work with the PMO to constantly improve our development processes
* Sponsor modernization initiatives including tooling, automation, and improved development workflows
* Drive responsible adoption of modern development tools (including AI‑supported development where approved)


**Partnerships and cross‑functional alignment**



* Work closely with Sales, Business Development, the project Management Office (PMO) and Partnerships to align technical capabilities with market demand
* Support strategic partner initiatives and technology collaborations
* Collaborate with labs and industrialization leadership to strengthen end‑to‑end delivery


**People leadership**



* Lead and develop engineering managers and senior technical leaders
* Build a culture of trust, accountability, and continuous improvement
* Drive recruitment and competence development in line with current and future demand


**Communication**



* Communicate R&D priorities, progress, and risks clearly to management team and the wider organization

title: Cyber Security Architecture Manager
description:
**Job Description**  

At H&M Group, our purpose is to liberate fashion for the many - making great design and value accessible to everyone. Technology and data are essential enablers of this mission and earning trust through secure and resilient digital capabilities is a vital part of how we serve millions of customers worldwide.


We are now looking for a Team Manager for Cyber Security Architecture, a strong people and cyber leader who will strengthen our enterprise-wide security architecture direction and empower a team of senior Cyber Security Architects.

**WHAT YOU'LL DO**


As the Team Manager for Cyber Security Architecture, you will:

* Lead, grow, and support the Cyber Security Architecture team, ensuring clarity in goals, direction, and priorities.
* Set the team’s focus based on business needs, risk, and architectural impact, ensuring resources are applied where they create the most value.
* Enable and empower architects by removing obstacles, providing coaching, and helping them navigate complex decisions.
* Establish and uphold effective ways of working for the capability, ensuring consistent use of principles, patterns, and architectural guidance.
* Drive alignment and collaboration across Enterprise Architecture, Platform Engineering, Cyber Security, and Product teams.
* Act as the senior escalation point for cross-cutting or high-impact architectural matters, applying hands-on expertise when needed to guide decisions.
* Represent the Cyber Security Architecture capability in relevant governance forums, enabling well-informed and timely decision‑making.

**WHO YOU ARE**


You are an experienced cyber security architecture leader who:

* Has strong, hands-on experience in cyber security architecture and IT, preferably within large global organizations, with a solid understanding of the retail value chain including online, in-store, supply chain, logistics, and warehouse operations.
* Understands core security architecture responsibilities, including defining principles, patterns, guardrails, and enabling secure-by-design decisions.
* Can guide teams and stakeholders in applying security architecture across products, platforms, and technologies.
* Communicates clearly, builds alignment, and influences effectively in complex environments.
* Balances strategic thinking with practicality, enabling teams to move forward with clarity.
* Has at least 5 years of proven leadership and people management experience, including developing senior specialists and leading through influence.
* Brings curiosity, collaboration, and a people-first leadership style.

**WHAT YOU BRING**

* Experience leading or influencing enterprise/security architecture functions.
* Broad understanding across cloud, application, IAM, data protection, and platform security.
* Strong grounding in frameworks such as ISO 27001/27002, NIST CSF, C2M2, SABSA, or TOGAF.
* Proven ability to align stakeholders and drive architectural direction.
* Experience with governance, capability models, principles, or reference architectures.
* Certifications such as CISSP, CISM, CCSP, SABSA, TOGAF, or Microsoft Cybersecurity Architect are a plus.


Why Join Us?


At H&M Group, you’ll be part of a global community where you can:

* Make a real impact on a Fortune 500-scale technology landscape.
* Shape the future of how a global retailer protects its digital ecosystem.
* Grow your leadership and architectural influence in a modern tech organization.
* Work in a culture grounded in inclusivity, creativity, and empowerment.


If you’re driven by purpose, enjoy leading experts, and want to help secure one of the world’s most recognizable brands—this is the role for you.

 **Additional Information** **WHO WE ARE**


H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.


We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future.


**WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE**


We offer all our employees at H&M Group attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. All our employees receive a staff discount card, usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. Brands covered by the discount are H&M (Beauty and Move included), COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP. You can read more about our H&M Incentive Program here.


In addition to our global benefits, all our local markets offer different competitive perks and benefits. Please note that they may differ between employment type and countries.

**JOIN US**

Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things – our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.


Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.
 

*\*We are committed to a recruitment process that is fair, equitable, and based on competency. We therefore kindly ask you to not attach a cover letter in your application.*
company_description: At H&M, we welcome you to be yourself and challenge you to grow and make a difference. Help us reimagine the future of an entire industry, making everyone look, feel & do good.

title: Solution Consultant - Tieto Caretech (m/f/d)
description:
Solna, Sweden


* Full-time
* Consulting
* Hybrid
* Tieto Caretech

  
Job Description  

At Tieto Caretech you’ll get a chance to provide citizens and end users with product offerings that help them in their life, reinventing the world for good. If that sounds interesting, please keep on reading.  



**About us**


We are a team of technical consultants working on assignments for our customers across Sweden and Norway, assisting with installations and various technical solutions. Our customers are primarily municipalities. Our team is distributed nationwide. We are now looking for a new colleague to join us in the role of Technical Consultant.  



**About the role**


In this role, you will provide IT systems strategy, development, and integration services to external clients. You will work closely with client organizations to assess their software, hardware, and network requirements, and advise on technology solutions that align with their business strategy and operational processes.


You will lead and contribute to a range of technology consulting projects, including Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP), technology strategy and transformation, information systems security, data strategy, and systems architecture. The role also involves supporting custom systems development, new system implementations, application migrations, enterprise application integration (EAI), as well as web, IP, and networking solutions.


This is a client-facing role where your ability to translate business needs into effective technology solutions will be key to delivering successful outcomes.

 **Your main responsibilities will include:**

* Install, configure, and maintain our operational environments for customers across Sweden and Norway
* Support municipalities with technical areas such as SQL Server, IIS, Azure, SAML|OIDC configuration, APIs, firewalls, and PKI certificate management
* Act as a technical expert in customer implementation projects, working closely with our development teams and business consultants
* Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues to ensure stable and secure system operation.
* Continuously build knowledge of our products and solutions as part of your onboarding and ongoing professional development
* Participate in an on-call rotation to ensure availability and support for critical systems outside regular working hours

 **We are looking for someone who has:**

* At least **5 years of relevant experience** in the field
* Strong experience with **Windows Server** and **Microsoft SQL Server**
* Hands-on experience with **Azure** and **IIS**
* Solid understanding of **networking and firewall configurations**
* Experience working with **APIs and system integrations**
* **Fluency in Swedish and English**, both written and spoken

  

As a person, you are an engaged and open team player who enjoys working with diverse cultures, driving projects forward, and ensuring high-quality deliveries. You are self-motivated, solution-oriented, and thrive in a role that combines both independent work and collaboration with colleagues and customers. You have a solid technical foundation and preferably experience within the sectors of Social Care or hands-on experience with systems such as Procapita/Lifecare/Socio/Gerica.  



**What’s in it for you?**

With us, you will be part of a dedicated team that provides internal and external support within our organization. You are outgoing, enjoy helping customers, and see each customer issue as a challenge that helps you grow. You will work with new technology and collaborate closely with experienced colleagues, giving you strong opportunities to develop in your role.  



**Could you be our new colleague?**

We look forward to hearing from you! We will fill the position as soon as we find the right person, so we encourage you to apply today. If you have any questions regarding this role, please contact the hiring managers fredrik.stadling@tieto.com

  

*We perform background checks on all final candidates.*

*Tieto declines calls from recruitment companies.*

  

Additional Information  

At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.


Diversity, equity and inclusion (tietoevry.com)


  
**We are Tieto - A leading software and technology consulting company**


We provide customers across different industries with mission-critical solutions through our specialized software businesses Tieto Caretech, Tieto Banktech and Tieto Indtech as well as Tieto Tech Consulting business.


Our around 14 000 talented vertical software, design, cloud and AI experts are dedicated to empowering our customers to succeed and innovate with latest technology.


Tieto’s annual revenue is approximately EUR 2 billion. The company’s shares are listed on the NASDAQ exchange in Helsinki and Stockholm, as well as on Oslo Børs.
company_description: Join our team to create purposeful technology that reinvents the world. For good.

description:
Solna, Sweden

Job Description **On-Call Dispute analyst- Tietoevry Banking**


As a Dispute Analystwithin Card Issuing, you will work with dispute handling for Swedish and other foreign banks. You will be part of the dispute department that has recently been built in Riga. The department's task is to process card complaints in accordance with current regulations from banks, authorities and card issuers.

  

The role will include case management, customer dialogue and follow-up of dispute cases. As a dispute analyst, you also have personal responsibility for a number of banks and work closely with both product managers and system managers in the area. * Close cooperation with our customers in connection with problems that arise regarding their disputes
* Participate in the work to further develop the dispute handling service

* Fluent in English and Swedish
* German and Finnish considered as an advantage
* Experience in case management
* Experience from the card industry and/or banking is an advantage
* Experience in dispute handling is desirable
* Knowledge of Visa and MasterCard products is an advantage
* Good cooperation skills

Interviews will be held continuously, so we encourage you to apply today! For more information or questions, please contact Talent Acquisition team recruitmentinbanking@tietoevry.com

title: Full Stack Builder
description:
Studies show that women and underrepresented groups often hesitate to apply unless they meet every requirement. At Stegra, we’re building an impact-driven, sustainable company - and we need a diverse, inclusive team to make it happen.
  
If you share our passion but don’t meet every qualification, we encourage you to apply anyway. You might be the perfect fit for this role, or another as we grow.
  
At Stegra, we’re not just building a plant, we’re proving that sustainable industry is possible. And to do that, we need people like you.
  
Join a team where safety comes first. Where we support each other, learn as we go, and make space for everyone to grow and contribute. This is your chance to be part of something big - while being closer to nature and leading a balanced, purposeful life.
  
What you’ll do
  
Right now, we are looking for a Full Stack Builder for our Digital Enterprise team. This is a new role at Stegra, and not a traditional developer position. As a Full Stack Builder, you will work broadly across the development lifecycle. You will collaborate closely with different parts of the business, explore ideas early, and turn them into working solutions using modern tools, including AI.
  
You will join one of our key domains, either enabling plant capabilities or the digital steel mill, both central to how we build and operate our business. In your domain, you will work close to real operations, helping shape solutions that make a tangible difference while growing your skills as a well-rounded digital builder.
  
This role is a great fit if you are early in your career or have a few years of experience and are motivated by learning, collaboration, and the opportunity to turn ideas into real, impactful solutions.
  
Specific to this role, the day-to-day tasks will include the following, but as we are a growing company with very little silos between teams, other tasks might be included as well.
  
Build and improve digital solutions end-to-end, from idea to production
  
Collaborate with stakeholders to understand needs and shape practical solutions
  
Develop integrations that enable smooth and reliable data flows across systems
  
Contribute to solution design, including structure, data models, and scalability
  
Work with modern development practices such as version control, CI/CD, and iterative delivery
  
Use AI tools to support development, learning, and problem-solving
  
Improve existing systems to increase usability, reliability, and long-term value
  
Support troubleshooting and continuous improvement of live solutions
  
  

What you’ll bring
  
You’re curious and believe that real progress happens when we work together. You enjoy learning, asking questions, and exploring new ways of doing things. You bring a thoughtful approach and contribute to a supportive and collaborative environment.
  
Specific to this role, we would like to see that you can tick off a fair amount of the boxes below
  
A degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or similar, or some hands-on experience in software development
  
Exposure to full stack development through studies, projects, or work experience
  
Interest in building solutions that create real value for users and the business
  
Familiarity with modern development practices such as version control and collaborative workflows
  
Curiosity about cloud environments, integrations, or scalable systems
  
Interest in using AI tools as part of how you learn and build
  
Comfortable collaborating with others and communicating in English
  
A proactive mindset and willingness to learn and grow over time
  
  

Applications are reviewed continuously, so we encourage you to apply as soon as possible.
  
Benefits at Stegra
  
At Stegra, you’ll join a company where your work has real impact on the climate, the industry, and future generations. We’re building a culture rooted in safety, trust, and inclusion, where people feel supported to grow and thrive.
  
You’ll receive fair, competitive compensation aligned with collective agreements, along with benefits like up to 30 days of paid vacation, occupational pension, parental benefits, and insurance. If you need support with relocation or immigration, our relocation department will help guide you through the process, whether it’s permits, housing or other practical matters. You can also enjoy perks like subsidized gym memberships and bike leases, plus the everyday benefits of life closer to nature.
  
This is Stegra
  
Stegra is on a mission to change the global steel industry by producing green hydrogen, iron, and steel - with the goal of eliminating CO₂ emissions. Instead of coal, we use green hydrogen and fossil-free electricity, meaning our primary emissions will be water and heat.
  
By 2030, our ambition is to produce 5 million tonnes of green steel annually in our fully integrated, digitized, and sustainable plant in Boden, Northern Sweden - currently under construction. But this is just the beginning. Our expertise in green hydrogen will enable us to decarbonize industries beyond steel, paving the way for a cleaner future.
  
Our Boden Site
  
Our Boden site is located just west of Boden City, right in the heart of a growing green industrial hub in Northern Sweden. It’s where we’re building one of the world’s most modern, sustainable steel plants—designed with safety, efficiency, and people in mind. With just a 10-minute commute from town, you'll be close to both cutting-edge technology and the everyday convenience of living near nature, schools, and community life.

title: Enterprise Account Executive
description:
Come join the company that is reinventing cloud security and empowering businesses to thrive in the cloud. As the fastest-growing startup ever, Wiz is on a mission to help organizations secure cloud environments that will accelerate their businesses. Trusted by security teams all over the world, we have a proven track record of success and a culture that values world-class talent.


Our Wizards from over 20 countries work together to protect the infrastructure of our hundreds of customers, including over 50% of the Fortune 100, who trust us to scan and secure over 230 billion files daily. We're the leading player in a massive and growing market, but it's still early enough for you to make a significant impact. At Wiz, you'll have the freedom to think creatively, dream big, and use your full range of skills to contribute to our record growth. Come join our team and help us create secure cloud environments that allow the best companies to move faster.


**Enterprise Account Executive, Sweden**


**WHAT YOU'LL DO:**


* Demonstrate an intimate understanding of Wiz Cloud Security Solutions and their value to our customers
* Demonstrate ability to position and advise to CISO level executives with industry Point-of-View business insights; Continue to listen, build and grow executive relationships with customers
* Develop and close business to consistently meet or exceed quarterly sales quotas, in a way that reflects Wiz values
* Align with Wiz partner ecosystem to optimize market opportunity
* Maintain accurate pipeline management with expert-level forecasting
* Build effective working relationships with Solutions Engineering, Customer Success, Product, Marketing, Delivery, and Executive teams to ensure strategy alignment and achieve company objectives


**WHAT YOU'LL BRING**


* Minimum 5 years selling enterprise solutions in the cloud/security space
* Proven track record of effective selling at Enterprise level throughout the territory
* Good standing relationships with previous sales operation teams
* Ability to build great internal partnerships with key business units and their stakeholders
* A consultative and professional approach to engaging with customers
* Ability to pivot in a meeting vs. sticking to a script
* A proven track record managing accounts in cloud or cybersecurity ecosystem to elevate the business

  





*Applicants must have the legal right to work in the country where the position is based,* *without the need for**visa* *sponsorship.**This* *role does not offer**visa**sponsorship**.*



Wiz is an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, reproductive health decisions, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, genetic information, political views or activity, or other applicable legally protected characteristics.



By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Wiz will process your personal data in accordance with Wiz's Privacy Policy.

title: Enterprise Customer Success Manager
description:
**About Us**
 Velory is transforming how companies buy, manage, and reuse IT. Our platform automates the entire IT lifecycle from procurement to end-of-life helping companies operate smarter and save both time and money.
   

  

 A core part of Velory is our network of IT retailers. They are not just partners they are essential to how we deliver value.
   

  

 Through Velory, customers purchase hardware via IT retailers, making them a critical part of our product and delivery. At the same time, retailers are a powerful growth engine. By reselling Velory as part of their offering, they bring new customers, new revenue, and help us scale across markets.
   

  

 We’ve already proven that this model works. Now, we’re scaling it across Europe.
   

  

 We’re looking for someone who wants to take ownership of that journey building strong relationships, driving initiatives forward, and creating long-term value together with our customers and partners.
   

  

****What You Will Do****
 As a Client Manager at Velory, you will be the trusted advisor for our customers helping them unlock the full potential of the platform while identifying opportunities for expansion and long-term value creation.
   

  

**About The Role**
 You’ll operate at the intersection of
 **customer, product, and business** 
 owning relationships, driving implementations and leading complex projects such as migration to our next-generation platform.
   

  

**You will:**
* Own and develop a portfolio of customer accounts
* Drive commercial outcomes, including expansion and upsell opportunities
* Ensure successful onboarding and adoption of Velory
* Build strong relationships with key stakeholders, including C-level
* Identify customer needs and translate them into business opportunities
* Provide strategic guidance and best practices to maximize customer value
* Collaborate with Sales, Product, and Engineering to align on customer priorities and drive impact


****Who You Are****
 To excel in this role, you embody Velory’s core values and bring a creative, proactive mindset:
   

  

* Show ownership – You take initiative and see the bigger picture
* Manage speed – You remove obstacles and keep momentum
* Represent quality – You care about details and continuous improvement
* Earn trust – You are transparent, reliable, and communicative
* Deliver wow – You go beyond expectations in smart and creative ways


 You thrive in a fast-moving environment where things aren’t always fully defined—and that’s exactly how you like it.
   

  

**Required Skills**
* 3+ years of experience of similar role in fast growing company
* Experience of working with SaaS platforms
* Experience of working with C-level stakeholders
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills
* Ability to work independently and as part of a team
* A proactive mindset and eagerness to learn
* Fluency in English, both written and spoken


****What we offer****
* A unique opportunity to grow in a fast-paced scale-up
* Continuous learning with coaching and development
* Hands-on experience with a modern, AI-driven platform
* A collaborative and ambitious culture
* Flexible work setup
* Six weeks of paid vacation, ITP1 pension, private healthcare, and wellness allowance
* Office in central Stockholm


****Join Us****
 We’re building something ambitious and we’re just getting started.
   

  

 If you want to work close to product, customers and real impact, we’d love to hear from you.

title: MarTech Specialist
description:
At Electrolux Professional Group we hire to meet needs beyond tomorrow!
   

  

 UNLOCK YOUR POTENTIAL
   

  

 At Electrolux Professional Group, we believe potential powers progress. We’re not searching for perfection—we’re looking for people with the right mindset.
   

  

 If you're curious, resilient, and ready to grow, you'll find the space to lead, innovate, and together with us. Meet the needs beyond tomorrow.
   

  

 https://www.electroluxprofessionalgroup.com/en/join-us/
   

  

 MARKETING TECHNOLOGY SPECIALIST
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
 We are looking for a Marketing Technology Specialist to strengthen our global marketing organization supporting 21 brands across multiple Business Areas. This role will shape and streamline our marketing technology landscape, enabling teams to work in a more data‑ driven, automated, and efficient way.
   

  

 As the fourth strategic hire in the Group Marketing team, your focus will be on MarTech and technology‑ driven enablement. You will work closely with Brand, Digital Marketing, Social Marketing, IT, and the Business Areas, ensuring the right tools, platforms, and data are in place to support our global marketing goals.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Support the effective use of marketing technologies across brands and markets, ensuring consistency and scalability.
* Defining KPIs to measure MarTech adoption, usage, and impact.
* Act as a Group reference for MarTech topics related to content, assets, and activation, including Digital Asset Management (DAM).
* Ensure that the Digital Asset Management (DAM) system is well structured, governed, and adopted, enabling easy reuse and activation of assets across markets.
* Provide Group‑level frameworks, guidelines, and best practices to support country‑led campaigns, while execution remains in local training and enablement activities.
* Tool onboarding for the local team.
* Support performance reading, learning loops, and sharing best practices across markets.
* Contribute to Group MarTech projects by translating marketing needs into structured use cases and supporting tool adoption.
* Collaborate closely with Group Brand and Digital Marketing, Digital Transformation, IT, agencies, and local teams to improve workflows and operational efficiency.


 TOOLS YOU’LL WORK WITH
   

  

* Google Analytics
* CRM: Salesforce
* CMS: Wordpress Marketing Automation / Marketing
* Cloud Digital Asset Management (DAM)
* Data visualization and reporting toolsgoals.


**What’s Needed For You To Thrive**
* Few years of experience in a similar role.
* Knowledge of Salesforce, ideally Marketing Cloud, and an understanding of how it fits into a broader MarTech ecosystem.
* Strong understanding of analytics, tracking, automation, and marketing platforms.
* Structured, analytical, and results‑ driven, with a curious mindset.
* Ability to work cross‑ functionally in a global environment and structure initiatives, coordinate stakeholders, and follow delivery.
* Experience from an industrial or manufacturing environment is a plus.
* Fluent in English.


 OUR GUIDING PRINCIPLES
   

  

 Be Customer Obsessed. Build Trust. Be Bold. Act Sustainably.
   

  

 We’re building it every day — and we’d love your help.
   

  

**What’s In It For You**
 Trust, ownership, and the opportunity to grow.
   

  

* Be part of a company grounded in customer focus, sustainability leadership, innovation, and social impact. We aim to Meet Needs Beyond Tomorrow.
* The possibility to work hybrid and build a flexible work-life balance.
* Be part of an industry shift that makes a difference in how people live, cook, clean, care, and serve.
* Plus: country-specific perks and benefits designed to support your well-being.


 To be eligible for this role, you must already have the legal right to work in Sweden. We are unable to offer work permit sponsorship.

title: Senior ML/AI Engineer
description:
Our client is enhancing their data platform (Databricks) with AI capabilities and are looking for a senior ML Engineer. The person they are seeking has experience from the whole ML chain including data → feature → model → deployment → monitoring.
 







 The person does also have experience from cost consciousness – Dev, Deploy and Run vs. business value.
 







**Skill requirements﻿** 



* At least 5 years of experience building and maintaining production models and AI solutions
* Able to contribute to all parts of an AI solution
* Azure AI stack such as Azure AI services, Microsoft Foundry etc
* Strong Python skills
* Proficient in ML frameworks such as Tensorflow, PyTorch, MLlib and Scikit-Learn
* Hands on experience in designing and operating functions in Azure and Databricks
* Experienced with at least one MLOps tool (ideally MLFlow)
* Strong experience in one of NLP, computer vision, timeseries, anomaly detection with some experience in the others
* Experience with software engineering practices (version control, CI/CD, testing, etc.)



**﻿** 




**Nice to have:** 



* Experience with RAG systems
* Agentic systems and RPA
* PySpark/Apache Spark
* Event driven systems or streaming data
* Experience mentoring junior ML and Data engineers



 We offer continuously. That means that we sometimes remove the assignments before deadline. If you are interested we recommend that you apply immediately.
 



 Required skills
 




 AI
 





 Azure
 





 Databricks
 





 ML
 




 Languages
 




 English
 





 (Proficient)

title: Azure Cloud Specialist
description:
Brinner du för molninfrastruktur och vill bidra till en hållbar och modern IT-miljö inom en samhällsviktig verksamhet i Stockholm?
 



  





 Vi söker nu en Azure Cloud Specialist som vill arbeta med avancerad teknik i en organisation som kombinerar trygghet och långsiktighet med innovation och framtidstänk. Som nyckelperson i vår kunds satsning på en smart och effektiv hybridmiljö får du möjligheten att både påverka strategiska vägval och vara hands-on i utvecklingen av deras molnplattform.
 



  





 Tjänsten börjar som ett konsultuppdrag där tanken är att anställningen senare ska gå över till vår kund.
 



  





 Som konsult på Eccera får du en trygg anställning och samlar på dig värdefull arbetslivserfarenhet på uppdrag hos våra kunder. Din konsultchef stöttar dig i din utveckling där du hela tiden fyller på med nya erfarenheter och kunskaper. En utmärkt möjlighet att göra karriär.
 



  





**Dina arbetsuppgifter** 




 Som Azure Cloud Specialist blir du en del av vår kunds infrastrukturteam med hög teknisk kompetens. Du arbetar nära verksamheten och arkitekter för att implementera, drifta och vidareutveckla molnbaserade infrastruktur, både i Azure och on-prem-miljö.
 



  





 Du bidrar till att säkerställa att allt fungerar på ett effektivt, säkert och framtidssäkrat sätt.
 



  





*Exempel på arbetsuppgifter:* 



* Implementera och utveckla molnbaserade infrastrukturlösningar i Azure
* Stödja och utveckla hybridinfrastrukturen i nära samarbete med teamet
* Arbeta med säkerhetslösningar, automation, kostnadsoptimering och nya funktioner i molnplattformen



  





**Din profil** 




  





*Krav:* 



* Minst 7 års erfarenhet i liknande roller
* Certifiering inom Microsoft Azure (t.ex. Azure Administrator Associate eller Security Engineer Associate)
* Mycket goda kunskaper inom Azure-plattformens kärnkomponenter: Compute, nätverk, lagring, identitet, säkerhet och automation
* Erfarenhet av Azure Virtual Desktop, Application Gateway, Application Proxy och Intune
* Vana vid hybridmiljöer och god kännedom om kostnadsstyrning i Azure
* Färdigheter i PowerShell och hantering av Conditional Access
* Erfarenhet av Entra ID och Active Directory
* God kommunikationsförmåga på svenska och engelska



  





*Meriterande:* 



* Kunskap inom DNS, Linuxmiljöer, Terraform eller annan IaC-lösning
* Erfarenhet av certifikatshantering, PKI, ADCS



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 




 På Eccera får du de verktyg du behöver för att nå dina mål. Vi erbjuder alla våra konsulter kvalificerade utbildningar och certifieringar inom den senaste tekniken. Vi sätter stort värde på att våra medarbetare hela tiden ska fortsätta att utvecklas. Därför erbjuder vi dig möjligheten att lägga upp en individuell utbildningsplan, där vi bekostar såväl studiematerial som själva certifieringarna. Under din utveckling kommer vi matcha din kompetens mot rätt uppdrag i takt med att du avancerar.

title: Partner Sales Manager within IT Retail
description:
**About Us**
 Velory empowers companies to automate and secure IT asset management in one seamless platform. From purchase to end-of-life, our software ensures complete control over IT assets with a sustainable, circular approach.
   

  

 Velory is transforming how companies buy, manage, and reuse IT. Our platform automates the entire IT lifecycle from procurement to end-of-life helping companies operate smarter and save both time and money.
   

  

 A core part of Velory is our network of IT retailers. They are not just partners they are essential to how we deliver value. Through Velory, customers purchase hardware via IT retailers, making them a critical part of our product and delivery. At the same time, retailers are a powerful growth engine. By reselling Velory as part of their offering, they bring new customers, new revenue, and help us scale across markets.
   

  

 We’ve already proven that this model works. Now, we’re scaling it across Europe.
   

  

**About The Role**
**Your mission is clear:**
 Sign top-tier retailer partners across Europe and build a channel that drives revenue. You will own the commercial process end-to-end, with a strong focus on pipeline, deal execution, and closing.
   

  

**This includes:**
* Identify and prioritise leading IT retailers in key European markets
* Create and maintain a strong, high-quality pipeline
* Focus on partners with real revenue potential
* Closing high-impact partnerships
* Own the full deal cycle from first contact to signed agreement
* Position Velory as a growth driver for retailers, enabling new customers and new revenue streams
* Leverage Velory’s proven retailer model and adapt it across markets
* Identify what works and replicate success across regions
* Contribute to building a repeatable European partner playbook
* Bring insights from retailer conversations into product, pricing, and go-to-market
* Continuously sharpen the pitch based on what converts
* Stay focused on outcomes: signed partners and revenue potential


**What success looks like:**
* Signed partnerships with retailers that can drive meaningful revenue
* Consistent deal velocity and high close rate
* Expansion of Velory’s retailer footprint across key European markets


**Required Skills**
* Experience in B2B sales, partnerships or business development
* Experience within IT retail
* Proven track record of closing deals and driving commercial outcomes
* Strong communication and negotiation skills
* Fluent in English


****Nice to have****
* Experience working with IT retailers or resellers in Europe
* Background in SaaS, IT hardware or marketplaces
* Experience from a startup or scale-up environment where you have had to build and move fast
* Additional European languages


****Who you are****
 You are a commercial builder with a strong focus on closing, creating momentum and turning opportunities into signed partnerships.
   

  

* Show ownership: You are highly commercial and driven by results, taking full responsibility for outcomes and consistently turning opportunities into real business impact
* Manage speed: You have a strong ability to prioritise and focus on high value opportunities, moving fast and maintaining momentum in a scale up environment
* Represent quality: You run a sharp and structured process that drives deals forward and increases close rate
* Earn trust: You are confident in negotiations and stakeholder management, building strong relationships through clear communication and reliable follow through
* Deliver wow: You are motivated to go beyond expectations, creating impact in ways that stand out and leave a lasting impression


**What We Offer**
* A unique opportunity to grow and learn in a fast-paced scale-up environment.
* A collaborative and inclusive work culture.
* Flexible work arrangements.
* Daily breakfast buffet at the office.
* Workouts with PT at the office gym.
* Private healthcare insurance and a generous wellness grant.
* Six weeks of paid vacation and ITP1-level pension.
* Select your preferred equipment via our own Velory Platform.
* Stockholm HQ with remote flexibility


****Join Us****
 At Velory, you’ll be more than just an intern – you'll be a key player in our mission to revolutionize the digital landscape. If you’re ready to bring your creativity, skills, and passion to our team, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Driven innesäljare med fokus på fastighetsinformation i olika leveranskanaler
description:
Vill du arbeta med att tillhandahålla fastighetsinformation som används av bland annat banker, fastighetsbolag, energibolag och skogsbolag i olika processer för att kommunicera med fastighetsägare?
   

  

 Metria söker nu en innesäljare som vill arbeta med försäljning av fastighetsinformation.
   

  

 Som innesäljare ansvarar du för att utveckla nya affärer och mersälja till kunder inom B2B. Du säljer abonnemang, lösningar via API:er och fil samt digitala informationstjänster som hjälper våra kunder att till exempel analysera marknader, kommunicera med intressenter och effektivisera sina processer.
   

  

 Du driver hela säljprocessen:
   

  

* Prospektering och kvalificering av leads
* Behovsanalys och rådgivande dialog
* Offert och förhandling
* Avslut och uppföljning


 Du arbetar nära våra produktspecialister och får snabbt en djup förståelse för våra erbjudanden.
   

  

**Du säljer**
 Du hjälper kunder att hitta rätt fastighetsinformation och rätt leveranssätt.
   

  

 Metria erbjuder:
   

  

* Digital fastighetsinformation
* Geodata och karttjänster
* API-baserade dataleveranser
* SaaS-tjänster


 Våra kunder finns inom fastighet, bank/finans, energi/telecom, samhällsbyggnad, skog och offentlig sektor.
   

  

**Vi söker**
 Vi söker dig som har erfarenhet av konsultativ B2B-försäljning, gärna inom urvalsaffär eller informationstjänster.
   

  

 Du:
   

  

* Har minst 2–3 års erfarenhet av proaktiv försäljning inom B2B
* Är van att arbeta med nykundsbearbetning
* Trivs med lösningsförsäljning snarare än transaktionsförsäljning
* Arbetar strukturerat i CRM (Salesforce är meriterande)
* Kommunicerar obehindrat på svenska och engelska


 Erfarenhet av GIS, geodata eller fastighetsbranschen är meriterande – men inget krav.
   

  

**Varför Metria?**
 Hos oss säljer du inte en generisk tjänst – du säljer data som påverkar hur samhället planeras, byggs och utvecklas.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder:
   

  

* En marknadsledande position inom geodata och fastighetsinformation
* Tydlig onboarding och produktutbildning
* Kort väg från idé till beslut
* Moderna lokaler på Kungsholmen
* Möjlighet att utvecklas inom företaget


**Om Metria**
 Metria är en del av
 **SPIR Group** 
 , en nordisk koncern med cirka 260 medarbetare i Sverige och Norge.
   

  

 Vi är experter på geografisk information, GIS och fjärranalys, fastighetsinformation och digitala lösningar som gör samhället smartare, grönare och mer hållbart.
   

  

 Tillsammans är vi ca 125 personer i Sverige som delar samma drivkraft:
   

  

**Framtiden är digital och hållbar – vi skapar den tillsammans.**
**Praktisk info**
 Publicerad: 30 april 2026
   

  

 Plats: Stockholm, Kungsholmen
   

  

 Omfattning: Heltid, tillsvidare
   

  

 Lön: Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

 Sista ansökningsdag: 24 maj 2026
   

  

**Skicka in din ansökan redan idag!**
 Vi intervjuar löpande och ser fram emot att lära känna dig.

title: Senior IAM Engineer | SEB, Solna
description:
The IAM Platform team is now looking for a new team member. We work closely together and share the passion for great technology and creating a smooth engineering experience. Our group consists of people with different expertise, experiences, age and background. We have an open and friendly approach towards each other.
   

  

**About the role:**
 At this position within Integrations & Connectivity, you will join a highly skilled IAM team responsible for designing, building, and operating SEB’s Identity and Access Management platforms across both on-prem and cloud environments. The team works with modern IAM technologies, strong security practices, and deeply integrated solutions that are part of SEB’s DevOps toolchains and digital platforms.
   

  

 As a Senior IAM Engineer, you will take an active role in evolving our IAM platforms by analyzing needs, designing architecture, and implementing robust technical solutions. IAM is a highly prioritized area at SEB, which means close collaboration with development teams, security, cloud, and infrastructure units across the organization. You will also be a key contributor to SEB’s cloud journey, ensuring that IAM capabilities support scalable, secure, and compliant cloud services.
   

  

**You will be responsible for:**
* Designing and implementing IAM solutions and architectures
* Operating and evolving IAM platforms and infrastructure
* Supporting cloud and platform onboarding with secure IAM patterns
* Troubleshooting identity related issues and ensuring compliance with security policies
* Continuously improving the organization’s overall security posture in close collaboration with cross- functional teams


**To thrive in this role, we believe you have:**
* 5 years or more experience within IAM engineering. Expert and hands on experience on access management tools
* Good knowledge of networking fundamentals (TLS, DNS, proxies, firewalls, VPNs)
* Advanced knowledge of certificate management and PKI, including handling SSL/TLS certificates
* Advanced knowledge with identity federation technology (ex. OpenID Connect, OAuth2).
* Experience on managing different IDP solutions (Identity providers)
* Good knowledge with Single Sign-On and Multi Factor Authentication solution (ex. FIDO2).
* Advanced knowledge with DevSecOps tools (e.g. managing platforms with Kubernetes, Docker, Git, Github actions).
* Advanced knowledge in programming languages, such as Java, Python, Go, Spring or Javascript.
* Good knowledge in Linux, Idap, Openshift and Infra-as-code (Terraform, Ansible and Helm)
* Experience working in hybrid and multi-cloud enterprise environments, including secure integration across multiple cloud providers and on-premises platforms.
* Hands-on experience with one or more enterprise identity platforms, such as Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD), Keycloak, or Curity.
* Experience operating within complex and highly integrated IT environments.
* Advanced troubleshooting capabilities and a deep understanding of IT infrastructure with the ability to diagnose and resolve complex identity and access issues across diverse systems and environments.


**What we offer:**
* An international and empowering environment with highly skilled colleagues.
* Work-life balance & hybrid way of working.
* Extensive training and learning opportunities.
* Friendly and welcoming culture.
* Exciting opportunity to be part of transforming an industry.
* Attractive compensation and benefits.


 Do you want to be part of SEB?
   

  

 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial to our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today, but no later than 25th of May 2026. If you have questions about the position, please contact our talent acquisition partner louise.almberg@seb.se Please not that we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment
   

  

 Learn more about working at SEB here: sebgroup.com/techcareers
   

  

 https://sebgroup.com/career
   

  

 https://bit.ly/SEBcareer

title: iOS developer
description:
